name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: It's more important than ever that we defend our pro-choice majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
It angers and saddens me that after being settled law for almost fifty years, Roe v. Wade has beenoverturned, and access to a safe and legal abortion is now banned or severely limited in states across the country. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46983176/352570232/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA1NDFmYy1lMmY0LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGD686e4dz8ciDY8ysCwnIGnZY_EG_RnqgVVaPaQniY=&emci=b0958d51-dff3-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=700541fc-e2f4-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

It angers and saddens me that after being settled law for almost fifty years, _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned, and access to a safe and legal abortion is now banned or severely limited in states across the country.

I've been a lifelong advocate for women's rights and Planned Parenthood. I debated in favor of abortion rights when I was in middle school. In 1987, I protested Robert Bork's nomination to the Supreme Court.

And as a doctor, I saw firsthand how important it is that every woman be empowered to make her own reproductive health care decisions. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46983177/352570233/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA1NDFmYy1lMmY0LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGD686e4dz8ciDY8ysCwnIGnZY_EG_RnqgVVaPaQniY=) In 2017, I joined hundreds of thousands of women at the first Women's March. We took a united stand to let the Trump administration know that we were not going to stand by while they attacked reproductive rights. I didn't know it then, but that day helped me decide to run for office for the first time. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46983178/352570234/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA1NDFmYy1lMmY0LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGD686e4dz8ciDY8ysCwnIGnZY_EG_RnqgVVaPaQniY=) **As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, I know that deeply personal reproductive decisions should be between patient and doctor.** The government should _never_ be in charge of these decisions. That's why I'm working in Congress to defend reproductive rights for all women.

And as long as I'm your congresswoman, I will continue to work to ensure that we protect this fundamental right for every woman, no matter where she lives. But four extreme, anti-choice Republicans are running to unseat me – so to keep fighting for reproductive rights in Congress, I need your help, Peter.

**[Will you make a donation to my campaign before my FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to ensure I can continue fighting to defend reproductive rights in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46983179/352570235/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA1NDFmYy1lMmY0LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGD686e4dz8ciDY8ysCwnIGnZY_EG_RnqgVVaPaQniY=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46983180/352570236/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA1NDFmYy1lMmY0LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGD686e4dz8ciDY8ysCwnIGnZY_EG_RnqgVVaPaQniY=) Thank you,

Kim
**To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46983181/352570237/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220625_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA1NDFmYy1lMmY0LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGD686e4dz8ciDY8ysCwnIGnZY_EG_RnqgVVaPaQniY=)

Friend,

The Fake News and their allies, the Democrats, have come after my father with WITCH HUNT after WITCH HUNT with the hope of taking him down. **They 've never won - not once - and yet it never ends.**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxtUcuO3CAQ_BrPzRbDyzMHH7LrbFYaKZeVktwQgbbNCDDCeCf--wXHSS6RWkhUV5eqq3WH1QUrdTIdRhgjjjlCiDHaXFqlf1J2ba-DOmukKooexjd69tLqe4qrC42a3Wnq2EAGNUimgGlENZdnRCmhEjFoMRnwyXZTSmGpyKcKv-RaQK0RmiwXQReRgsl3qKWDaJSs77PxqR5Wr6M0i_FjnUnOpASQqfArrH6E2rgAUk0OfCq65CUW3ZjpFemzwczlbvawiWBBj_APlW5e8xDpGcq_NTnhQJvVZQScNFZMw4Ev8xpVmXRKeJnrwJV0QZrR586RGxP_8SV-x7WndY-iLHns-Edn9gl2K4WZQKiwxUV4ZcmV0EwS3hqd25y-Pevb9srZDk5G5zz7z9--XNbztZWn2OnwMNaahbf5VGNZY79PNmrNsHVV-1RhvM9hvJ8C3-jTj6_89v3W15iOuu45o4_Sxc_5TVuAv9RDpdnjKWjbfwDtp7te)**

This is **URGENT** , so I will cut to the chase. Republicans are working on getting my father's UNCONSTITUTIONAL IMPEACHMENT EXPUNGED. The Left wrongfully IMPEACHED my father because they hate him, and we can't let them get away with it.

**We NEED YOUR SUPPORT, Friend. **

Throughout the Left's sinister games against President Trump, **tens of millions of taxpayer dollars were WASTED** , and YEARS were spent interfering with a presidential administration. **But, because of YOUR unwavering support, he never gave up -_HE FOUGHT BACK. _**

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: We’re sending a petition to Pres. Biden to open abortion clinics on federal lands, and we need your signature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Democrats can and must do more than wait for the next election.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220625-3139-header&t=1&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN)
Democrats can and must do more than wait for the next election. We have to secure our rights now, especially as red states move swiftly to cut off access to abortion care for millions of people.
One of the small steps that President Biden and the White House can take is opening abortion clinics on federal lands, especially in states where access to care is limited by inhumane state laws. We are compiling a petition to the White House demanding they do this right away, and we’re asking for your signature.
[**Sign your name on our petition to the White House calling for the opening of abortion clinics on federal lands.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/abortion-clinics/?source=em20220625-3139-P_ENG_VOL_ORG&t=2&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN)**Read the text below, and then add your name so we can demonstrate the depth of support behind this plan.**
On Friday, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, undermining a half century of precedent behind our fundamental rights to an abortion and bodily autonomy. We have to take immediate, bold action to ensure people can get the care they need in the wake of this dangerous ruling. **Today we are calling on President Biden and the White House to take executive action to open abortion clinics on federal lands.** This small step could help expand access to life-saving abortion care for people in all 50 states. **[Sign the petition →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/abortion-clinics/?source=em20220625-3139-P_ENG_VOL_ORG&t=3&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN)**
---
We will be delivering this petition as soon as possible to the White House, and we believe that it will be most impactful if we can get tens of thousands to sign on. We hope you’ll be able to add your name today.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
PS: We're also raising money for abortion funds + grassroots groups working to amend state constitutions to protect abortion rights. [**You can chip in here.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=abortion-aoc-email-20220625.KpG11T&refcode=em20220625-3139-P_ENG_VOL_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abortion-aoc-email-20220625?refcode=em20220625-3139-P_ENG_VOL_ORG&t=5&refcode2=3139_2526796_2ZvhrN&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220625-3139-P_ENG_VOL_ORG&t=6&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=3139%2E2526796%2E2ZvhrN)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Humbly asking, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

Yesterday’s Supreme Court decision sent a clear message to Georgia women:
access to reproductive healthcare is on the line — and on the ballot.

Georgia’s current, extremist governor signed a dangerous bill to ban
abortion after six weeks of pregnancy in 2019. Under his bill, abortion
would be banned before most women even know they’re pregnant. It has been
held up in the courts. Until now. Yesterday, a notice was filed in the
11th Circuit, which means Brian Kemp’s abortion ban will soon become the
law of the land. And Georgia will be an even more dangerous state for
women.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1481?refcode=sa_em_220625_B3_Roe_S1_T1_SYA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=756%2E1862389%2ENR9xE_ ]If you’re able, consider making your
first contribution to
our campaign now so that I can stand up for reproductive rights and pursue
reproductive justice as the next governor of Georgia.

Derek, I am
angry and I am committed. I am in this fight because who is governor
matters. Because yesterday’s decision determined that who is in charge at
the state level of government gets to decide who has bodily autonomy.
Because Georgians are counting on us to fight for them and protect them.

Under Brian Kemp, Georgia is at or near the bottom on every health care
measure — from doctor and nursing shortages, to maternal and infant
mortality rates to shuttering three hospitals during the pandemic.

With this ruling, the full range of threats facing Georgia women —
especially poor, Black, brown and rural women — and LGBTQ+ people are no
longer theory.

As governor, I will work every day to ensure access to affordable and safe
health care for all, including access to abortion. But first we have to
win in November.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1481?refcode=sa_em_220625_B3_Roe_S1_T1_SYA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=756%2E1862389%2ENR9xE_ ]Please, can you make your
first donation to
power my campaign right now? We’re mobilizing Georgians to hold Brian Kemp
accountable for his extreme, dangerous anti-abortion agenda on Election
Day, but we can’t do it alone.

Together, we can win this,
Derek. Let’s get it done.

Stacey

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1481?refcode=sa_em_220625_B3_Roe_S1_T1_SYA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=756%2E1862389%2ENR9xE_ ]DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=756%2E1862389%2ENR9xE_ ]receive fewer emails or

I went on NewsMax to discuss my pro-life stance.

Take a look!

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: RE: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I need your immediate attention.

Trump’s Supreme Court just ruled to rip reproductive rights away from every single woman in this country.

I don’t say this lightly:

**How we act TODAY will decide the future of reproductive rights.**

We can either sit back and admit defeat to these far-right extremists...

[**Or we can RISE UP, meet this ONCE-IN-A-GENERATION moment, and marshal a response so HISTORIC that we make every last anti-choice Republican REGRET what they’ve done. PleaseFALLBACK, I’ve never needed your support more than today. Can you chip in $15 so we can WIN these midterms and finally codify reproductive rights into law? >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/15786?t=6&akid=3474%2E878179%2EduLfie)

This isn’t a normal fundraising email.

And a normal response won’t suffice.

Tomorrow morning, Republican operatives will look at our results from THIS EMAIL to see whether strong Democrats like you are fired up.

If we post the same run-of-the-mill numbers, McConnell and McCarthy will think they can get away with ANYTHING.

So, I’m asking you to step up in this moment of crisis.

[**Our ONLY option is to marshal a response so historic -- 100,000 gifts before midnight -- that we DEFEAT every anti-choice Republican that made this happen, EXPAND our Majorities, and FINALLY codify our reproductive rights into law. So please, can I expect to see your name on my "Pro-Choice Champion" list tomorrow morning? >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/15786?t=7&akid=3474%2E878179%2EduLfie)

I know you’re livid. We both are. But in times of crisis, our ONLY response can be to stand up and fight for what’s right.

Thank you for fighting with me on the right side of history.

Nancy
---

subject: TONIGHT is the deadline to join ⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Patriot, we have good and bad news.

**The good news:** YOU were selected for the very exclusive Washington Circle of the 1776 club!

**The bad news:** TONIGHT is the deadline to join, and if you don't, you will be **PERMANENTLY BANNED from membership.**

Here's the deal: The first quarter deadline just passed, so now we can only accept new members until tonight. THOUSANDS of patriots are joining to stand with House Conservatives and champion common sense conservative values across the country.

_**[The choice is yours: Accept your membership right now and help House Conservatives win big in 2022 or face a permanent ban from ever joining this exclusive club.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60670190:6Fv9X5oRN:m:1:3299561967:4DD54EB78E496D85709BF6DA0D87411D:r "The choice is
yours: Accept your membership right now and help House Conservatives win big in 2022 or face a permanent ban from ever joining this exclusive
club.")**_

---

---

---

As a member of the exclusive Washington Circle:
* You'll receive priority status to limited-edition products
* You'll be the FIRST to receive critical campaign strategy updates
* Conservative leaders like Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise, and Vice President Mike Pence will personally send you important campaign emails.
* And, you'll be recognized as one of President Trump's leading grassroots Conservative supporters

---

Button")
---

Your support has not gone unnoticed and has had a MAJOR impact on our efforts to take back the House, which is why YOU have been hand-selected by House GOP leadership to receive an EXCLUSIVE invitation to join the Washington Circle.

If you miss the opportunity to join by midnight tonight, you will forfeit your potential status as a Washington Circle club member.

It's up to you. _**[Join now to take a stand>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60670190:6Fv9X5oRN:m:1:3299561967:4DD54EB78E496D85709BF6DA0D87411D:r "Join now to take a stand >>>")**_

Thank you,

Membership Alerts (Via House GOP)

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60670191:6Fv9X5oRN:m:1:3299561967:4DD54EB78E496D85709BF6DA0D87411D:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zufdp1jokfl2qmlla7u38sb9e2csomfs06s9mdi0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tljclpj6ojnm1jb8t31mdh3fd5lmpq68obnclhb0phkelob4cpim3i63djgmtg6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3cphksapmadtiehj33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z15l5fla9mbkjll1icmprnnaa19loqmp9q1dnll0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zado294soasj57t2s71satd6b7b518ngodmh6i80_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z708stg5hcelj69fv0msp3jucpd2eograqgueqjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za101op2na9hpcjete7q8f2q4flpqfdj6ghm4p5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znedkd6lt4un5uva6upg638uiko2nvlc5atv0u88_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb59lmmmupf4015539v5o3rasp2pa5ggvvbv4tng_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqejgk7sv8k2rkmrn4rvqhoqtcl8ghc5ese7cdpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu4ekd4agtapbcsggo8e4ja5cjgo999clo0cle2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2l1bouplk7q3b18nmo2qgea4o8t88uobkj8dvmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm5sp9om56g57ds83vl2p9b23uknfs6nidg82k08_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zakjlloj1qtuk2rqnu1rmcht49bb7p9r9hghdktg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ssa65tfg27p1t1bem6l68i3a91l0d1q76nni28_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoo13udq5bbl9mc3s5f4g8jp5820ok7r3ntjppfg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9cmpn2q2eetq7efou3u777cf15pibbgs7gja8oo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5skv065ug89brksr1cbbs7jijus15g6rmtv63gg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zls71spggqhpb7mm4shhtm6g2o13obm4rrpqjdl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd1m6sm5hn7j0qhe3ibfa9k03j911bast3vbsomo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgptidpg8498vuev9uuschlcpaj4vg5n2kau8d3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zco7qcu3uh4qhfh910op6qce6eris5o2tan02q20).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3aqslhbce5pmrrvh9dskkda2si82gs52fqhoh30_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cdh6cpr3c5im49fg)

BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc2pldf24h8raarboqiisrc2lionelndgbmhm84o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboj2cpncdpbct5je1gj8phhephnep756ppnbcb1edpjecthcjir2p1hc6qr8d1n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666obbcb0earmcc9n6mq3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clhm4pj7cdgmaoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu983j8pfau1dft0828micb3rqglp4pn32ph3m3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2pieoq5e7pr62d4tproni9ae3qanouk41up9tjg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zin7bnva3e9di5t8npqbcnehv5jr7dc5a2dpnb88_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9j6eor1clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Let’s talk

body:
It’s about time.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36602%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D5rhxEB8c4HRhlSHxI86UA&sysid=1)
---
Folks,

You know me - I’m not one to mince words. **I’m never going to beat around the bush, and I’m always going to give it to you straight.**

The End-of-Quarter is right around the corner, officially it’s 4 days away.
| [**DON’T GO - WAIT**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36603%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZxASiRvbuqXUACw73HDBqg&sysid=1)
---

**_Before you click away and disregard this email I’d like you to know just how important this is._**

After today, all of my fundraising numbers will be public - **_and after the numbers go public, the Democrats and their cronies will circle up and start concocting a formula for my defeat.

We can’t pull our punches here - we’ve got to show them that we won’t make this easy for them._**

I’m asking for you to lend me your support. **[When the numbers go public and the Democrats open the books on my campaign finances, I want them to be awestruck by our success.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36604%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DBVaubT9psCihTAEKXR3tw&sysid=1)**

clean_body: It’s about time. | Folks, You know me - I’m not one to mince words. I’m never going to beat around the bush, and I’m always going to give it to you straight. The End-of-Quarter is right around the corner, officially it’s 4 days away. | Before you click away and disregard this email I’d like you to know just how important this is. After today, all of my fundraising numbers will be public - and after the numbers go public, the Democrats and their cronies will circle up and start concocting a formula for my defeat. We can’t pull our punches here - we’ve got to show them that we won’t make this easy for them. I’m asking for you to lend me your support. God bless you, and God bless America. Best, John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63054%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R5GlxSVypyK5TA8%2fjIUz4Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63065%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fOj8e1ltcUlAeZS3eksZ5A&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to \- is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63066%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iprZaA0oz3%2fCkTO%2bdyMnlQ&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63067%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FS4YZ7iTzvXUV2Yg%2fKTX%2fQ&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63068%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D%2b3PuOyGWhS8IoaaB7bRGw&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63069%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hrNpZPxJTFKx%2bbgJNnM2Kg&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63060%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F7C29tXWlYbb%2fjza3k6cbw&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63061%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UEbfawdp%2bI4a46wbJQfxEg&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63062%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jgR5EsOR3KqvV2ejyAqHXw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63063%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FtO%2bqyCaC0YWf2fmfQ66fA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63064%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CP%2fGwGOjZbtD2yDDBqJbaA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63075%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=77bxuw90rl8dbQjl6FTLtA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63076%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fiaj21P4m0gZAmaqJttsDQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63077%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bu5daJRcPUKWRWBlGseExA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63078%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SwToLYBpbT4UV9fX2P6Amg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63079%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NOaIq65jtxzDTRGuLcHOYQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63070%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=egFMaMf%2fUeGX5pnDxU8jMA&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63071%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yTy6AdajDXTo6uLJdSd1LA&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6180%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=tE%2ftADHDOlRiyaWeDI4Zyw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6180%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=tE%2ftADHDOlRiyaWeDI4Zyw&sysid=1)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpba7rel52h6aokg4e8mmrj5lg25bbgti38j7dag_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm8oj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrbctth6cp62thgegp7ad5meeqb8p74e1jm4s5i6oo74cri65q70olnc5j33djnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6pj39pplm3jr5cj66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl6gubsmr2j1sgqevvdh1l66hs17c1klchcoi5qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm8oj2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1qqinr0rings3676udvk48cmsdb9vuh15d8mcd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm8oj2cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8segs3deddljjrha3v3nq8d68gijjt10ee3aov8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm8oj2cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0sfjn7tnimr7surh4vurhiofpm39g42kuhln110_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cdh62p32c9ie49fg)

name: Clara
subject: Drop Everything: Liberals now plotting to PACK THE COURT 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Save our Supreme Court NOW >> >>
**DROP EVERYTHING:** The Democrats are ALREADY UNDERMINING the Supreme Court's historic decision to protect life!
**EVEN WORSE:** Top Liberals -- including Elizabeth Warren and Ilhan Omar -- are going nuclear... they're plotting to **PACK THE SUPREME COURT!**
**IT DOESN 'T STOP THERE:** Nancy Pelosi knows everything hinges on this moment... the fate of the House Majority, the fate of the Supreme Court, the fate of our very nation... and she's pulled out all the stops to ensure this weekend is their best fundraising weekend in history.
_Don 't believe me? Radical grassroots activists gave nearly $6 million in the 3 hours following the Supreme Court's historic ruling._
[**I 'm pleading with you... No, I'm BEGGING. Can you chip in $50, $40, even just $25 RIGHT NOW to make Pelosi's plot BACKFIRE? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60670202:6KR6x5oTN:m:1:3299561967:EA042C2C654808874EE31CC44E106A06:r)
The Radical Left is emptying their pockets -- as you read this -- to undo every last Conservative achievement and pack the court with Left-Wing activist judges who will cement their FAILED agenda for centuries to come.
Patriot, unless we get all hands on deck, the Democrats will pack the court. They will make DC a state and pack the Senate. They will make abortion-on-demand.
[**If you don 't want to see that happen. You need to step up TODAY... tomorrow will be too late!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60670202:6KR6x5oTN:m:1:3299561967:EA042C2C654808874EE31CC44E106A06:r)
Pelosi's dialing every Liberal donor in her Rolodex to overwhelm PRO-LIFE, PRO-FREEDOM CONSERVATIVES with a flood of cash. She's going to post BIG NUMBERS to scare us off... but we can't step down. We can't give up on the fight.
_If we do, or if we fall even one dollar short, Pelosi will replace every single Pro-Life conservative with one of her loyal, socialist puppets._
[**I can 't emphasize enough how critical this moment is. I hope I can count on you to be on the right side of history.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60670202:6KR6x5oTN:m:1:3299561967:EA042C2C654808874EE31CC44E106A06:r)
Thank you,
Clara
\-- From Republican HQ (Team Scalise)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z470f0u9iheveb4irc6telgm949rrsnibmhdgqe0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcor36hh65clj65inacbnmhqm5d1jchg64oj3e6rm8orjemqmac32e1ib5cjk63jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor1ddhcup36phkc2pmcdtgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsigi78cgcaavmmq41difsecujjgig9m45kl01f0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgfdkgaqbi71teta2b9ve98feob0qhphnjoh1kp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znt5a119mkvuv6d6iomdeer0dkehh4lhpl4a3qvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zst1s9sgl567v961v69g35q491qb4f1a73b9rgbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zirth4purmpi8h615rd75bfgoq2s62d4ih1igd58_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zicdom18g8njqh2p24hkbt5e752p2n2k0k3rr2ig_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znsvmcmof899oeohark018v4v0hm2lmdinuf8si8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6hu8gnc9d9dhgt5d9iq3m3f817klpu8jpn4fjoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn247hljuh3247ufh24kvnjmkg5enetrk8nmk9g8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoi55lr1tma38fa90iigj3oph0vudecrchjg5pfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh1n9jip672aik9osk7an8c5bg8l6cnmh3ohctqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zklvklm9et0i0jjha843s15mm9ro8ns9vn9srptg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpdbvnk1tgo8ccji3763rgcgd44b1obmncrggra0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zviuodjr0a87ctrbrgcvtkk0jeov1mombleg7f7o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zijvdlkcnpbj919m24fk7iv3b6bfi5ff2rn6uq78_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbqgr62n7pem0n8t2kkne866i7ge5oaqd3ruthi0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg3546iac9vg0jfp093fopi3j27rf5q6usq4ri80_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziotrtap3b9dc20ui21h289spok8o715nqltv1b0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gmco32cph2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z3m10iegh9gm53a4ju84bqpkt9vl89q385o72rn0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsBDJLAhNf

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only
take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our
nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives-but
supported by many well-meaning Americans-to change the way we
elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the
Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBDJLAhNf

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent
matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but
the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by
progressives-but supported by many well-meaning Americans-to
change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do
away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our
Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a
National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to
me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more
clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning
this issue-views we will make available to policymakers and
opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on
Presidential Selection by using the link below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey

For most of our nation's history, the
Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution,
was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to
preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have
joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional
bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution
has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to
provide young people with a proper grounding in American
civics-too many Americans simply don't understand the importance
of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has
expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide,
directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the
Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide
through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The
Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over 5.6 million households and
businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of
liberty;

Promoting constitutional education
through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of
America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across
America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education
through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which
launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools
nationwide.

Your answers to the National Survey on
Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most
effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the
importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this
critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent
topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection
and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a
few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure
link I've provided below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey

And after you take your survey, I hope you
will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a
tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing
truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its
extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is
essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the
National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for
your time and attention-and for your friendship and support of
liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

name: Val Demings
subject: This fight is not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm angry, friend
| | |
---
I'm angry, friend – but sadly, I'm not surprised: **The U.S. Supreme Court just upended nearly half a century of precedent by overturning _Roe v. Wade_. **The votes of five hard-line conservatives just eviscerated reproductive freedom for at least 32 million women across the country.
To all of you out there who are shocked, angry, scared – please know that I feel your pain. I hear your anxiety.**** And that is why I say:** This fight is not over. We will NOT go back.**

We will not go back to a time when women were treated as second-class citizens. We will not go back to a time when personal health care decisions were made for us by politicians like Marco Rubio. We will not go back to a time when women died because they didn't have the basic human right of deciding when to start their own family.
Friend, the right-wing justices on the Supreme Court just did what GOP politicians like Marco Rubio have been pushing for for decades. **Now, we can only safeguard reproductive freedom if we expand our Democratic majority and codify the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ into law.**
**[So today I'm asking you to turn your anger into action. Guarantee an expanded Democratic majority by donating to help me defeat Marco Rubio here in Florida. Whatever you can donate at this urgent moment will ensure our grassroots campaign has the resources to send a pro-choice woman to the Senate and show extremist Marco Rubio the door. Please donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46986623/352605132/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3650-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmI3ODk4NS00N2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HK_fhrUdtHT921qImU784l9lJiv5JfLk10jMu4msuE=)**
We have witnessed years and years of coordinated Republican-led assaults on reproductive freedom that culminated in Friday's decision by the Supreme Court. It's a sad, dark time for our country. I am determined to not go back – but I _need_ you and your determination alongside me. Let's flip this seat blue, expand our majority and codify _Roe_ into law.

Thank you so much.

Val Demings

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: 3 Immediate Threats to Your Wealth
body:
Three terrifying forces are converging to immediately threaten your wealth:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgaaeo6kti39vt4qmfblkflqfr4gt68de10tcmsg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr70ob1ctj31p366dir5cjlclgr0pjhcmrrcdjl6grr1pjnm2orcdj5epgeectnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6pj39pplmhjr4tr664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clhm4ob0sdjm6oh5u)
| | | | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3r3qn9dbp1torlfm3vjad8a0puipi63mlb74vq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1or7cdh2bs)
---
Three terrifying forces are converging to immediately threaten your wealth:
**Force #1** is the destruction of any decent INTEREST you could possibly earn on your savings. Even if the Fed raises rates, you'll be lucky if you can earn a meager 1% before the end of the year.
My solution: An investment strategy that yields $1,000 or more of extra income, nearly every week. ([Watch this](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhhv8bl3e091p566abi4r5ksjo1ho3rs5fdfd1f0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1or7cdh2bs) for the details.)
**Force #2** is the rapid erosion of your PRINCIPAL by surging inflation. Already, it's the worst in four decades. And it's just _beginning_ to spiral out of control.
My solution: Choice investments that have historically surged when inflation rises and skyrocketed when inflation surges. (More info in [this video](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuqmrap4dks636hcmfvhnt2qrj5ndb7aq0pji6v8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1or7cdh2bs).)
**Force #3** is the gut blow to your PORTFOLIO in a crashing stock market.
My solution: Unique investments that doubled and tripled in value in prior market crashes. (See [this](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3pei7ofh04ovt0aqmg58r9cjmpdf4s7c7p8i9bo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1or7cdh2bs).)
I've put it all together in [my 7-step plan for 2022](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z46qsgg9jh3a4jn7o36cproad49klumpr8n68bc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1or7cdh2bs).
I think it's exactly what the doctor ordered in this chaotic new world.
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder

| Follow us:

name: Troy Newman
subject: BREAKING: Can you believe it?
body:
Did you see the U.S. Supreme Court’s ruling on Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4m126l8e6andbp92ptolm9nspk95v1kvt3as6o8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ucrr4djkclor9cthcorb0otksgpj0slkehh62stgedqn4pbksgr7ao73clqmbc37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhm2qr2pti61j7applmhjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cdh62o71c5ge49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztf9bj96bc5ohj11m8u92fpbfqjmtknonh46allo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1ob1c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, **Did you see the U.S. Supreme Court’s ruling on _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health_? ** This decision is a good first step – and a victory that deserves to be celebrated! But Fellow American, this also poses a great challenge for Pro-Life Champions like you and me. Abortion Extremists will pivot in this post-Roe country. They won’t stop targeting unborn lives with their deceptive practices. Even President Biden is attempting to sign an executive order to protect the continued killing of the precious unborn! That’s why it’s critical to continue Operation Rescue’s lifesaving efforts in this defining moment. **[_Will you give your best gift now to help continue the lifesaving work of exposing the Abortion Cartel and holding them accountable for their crimes?_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqbe2mrlgsejifoi7d56a4gmo1fk3b78nnafono_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1ob1c3h2bs)**
---
[**Support Operation Rescue Now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4k1c5fks31v10gff5b89clf1ocgn87fa9ccg2n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1ob1c3h2bs)
---
I don’t want to diminish this significant victory for the Pro-Life movement. It truly is remarkable – the ruling we have all prayed would come! But let’s not forget one important thing ... **America is still not abortion-free.** The states now have the power to determine their abortion laws. And while some states will enact laws that protect life, you can count on the Abortion Cartel attacking Operation Rescue and changing its tactics to continue reaching and profiting off vulnerable women and unborn lives. Now is not the time to take a victory lap. We must stay vigilant. **[_Your gift right now will continue critical rescue operations in Pro-Abortion states and hold Abortion Extremists accountable for their illegal activity._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9n6ckr7vg773bqssgmt9pmbvadkeinp3mp7re9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1ob1c3h2bs)**
---
[**Support Operation Rescue Now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8hflgc4ct53ctopr7g8se3dv2e2qb6mbs6h6gr0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1ob1c3h2bs)
---
Because this is new, uncharted territory for the Pro-Life movement. And with your continued support, your Operation Rescue stands ready to enforce the laws, expose abortion crimes, and save more lives from the deception of Big Abortion. **[_So please, give your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more now. And continue to rescue more unborn babies from the horror of abortion and expose extremists for their grisly practices._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhk512idq5pcehanar7rlolo2r907d22ek3230qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9gm1ob1c3h2bs)** With your help, we won’t stop until every single unborn life is protected in this country. Thank you for your faithful support. God bless, — Troy
---

Hello,
Let’s be very clear what the Supreme Court has done: **Overturning Roe v Wade means that at least half of America has lost their right to choose what’s best for them and whether abortion can even be a consideration. With no exceptions.**
And when we say no exceptions, that means even when the life of a mother is at stake. Even in cases of incest. Even in cases of rape.
**It’s a cruel decision against every woman and girl, and the worst part is: It’s meant to be cruel.**
The justices who have decided to overturn 50 years of precedent were nominated and confirmed by Republicans... Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley, who was chair of the Judiciary Committee when he blocked Merrick Garland and rammed through Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett.
**Chuck Grassley is responsible for this – for this cruelty – and this November, he will receive due justice. We will donate, organize, and then out-vote his supporters. His long string of victories in the ballot box will screech to a halt.**
[**The future of women’s rights is now at stake. Please, will you chip in now to my campaign – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46991020/352622631/-42398318?refcode=em20220626am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZThjZDAxNC01NGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0uvVc27LQ5SOh8_QcNJBDMDDkWjv-h2UqkWi0up2WJE=)

clean_body: Hello, Let’s be very clear what the Supreme Court has done: Overturning Roe v Wade means that at least half of America has lost their right to choose what’s best for them and whether abortion can even be a consideration. With no exceptions. And when we say no exceptions, that means even when the life of a mother is at stake. Even in cases of incest. Even in cases of rape. It’s a cruel decision against every woman and girl, and the worst part is: It’s meant to be cruel. The justices who have decided to overturn 50 years of precedent were nominated and confirmed by Republicans... Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley, who was chair of the Judiciary Committee when he blocked Merrick Garland and rammed through Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett. Chuck Grassley is responsible for this – for this cruelty – and this November, he will receive due justice. We will donate, organize, and then out-vote his supporters. His long string of victories in the ballot box will screech to a halt. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It has never been more important that we codify Roe v Wade in law once and for all. But the only way we’ll do it is if we win this November. Thank you for joining this fight against cruelty and injustice. Mike Franken, U.S. Navy Vice Admiral (ret.)
