name: Charlie Crist Finance Dept.
subject: If we don’t hit this quarterly goal, we’ll have a hard time beating Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and we’re still falling short! |
---

| | Hi there, it’s Charlie Crist’s finance team.

You might have heard that we set an aggressive goal of raising $100,000 by the time this quarter ends on June 30. It’s going to be a challenge, but it’s what we need to do if we’re going to beat Ron DeSantis.

**_[To get us where we need to be, we’re asking everyone to pitch in a few dollars. Can you do that now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46991925/352625371/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220625_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU1MzJjYi01NGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOrnDDWJ1lVSDfjxrppta9vp80MwY2AzP0ISEcLM5OQ=)_ We’ll be honest with you — if we fail to reach this goal, we’ll have a hard time defeating Ron DeSantis. He just has so many resources to attack us with.**

Unlike Gov. DeSantis, Charlie doesn’t rely on right-wing, billionaire donors and their deep pockets. He depends on his incredible grassroots team, and that’s why we're coming to you today.

Make no mistake: Right-wing billionaires are already shelling out big money to steer this election in their favor. So we need to show everyone — including DeSantis — that we have what it takes to defeat his extremist agenda and protect reproductive freedom.

We wouldn’t ask if we didn’t need your help, friend. **_[If you can spare any amount before our June 30th deadline, we know Charlie would be very grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46991926/352625372/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220625_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU1MzJjYi01NGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOrnDDWJ1lVSDfjxrppta9vp80MwY2AzP0ISEcLM5OQ=)_**

We profoundly appreciate your support!

— Finance Department, Team Crist **________________________________** Hi there, Charlie Crist here. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46991927/352625373/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220625_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU1MzJjYi01NGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOrnDDWJ1lVSDfjxrppta9vp80MwY2AzP0ISEcLM5OQ=)
---
I wanted to write to say thank you for everything you’re doing to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Florida can’t afford another four years of his divisive politics in the governor’s office, and I appreciate your support in this race.

Whether we have a governor who will fight climate change, protect our communities from gun violence, and defend reproductive freedom will depend on the outcome of this election. Governor DeSantis wants to use the governor’s office to advance an extreme, far-right agenda that he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president, and we can’t let that happen.

But while he has out-of-state billionaires writing check after check to his campaign, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in anything you can to help me fight back. **_[If you can, please click here to make a donation to support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46991928/352625374/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220625_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU1MzJjYi01NGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOrnDDWJ1lVSDfjxrppta9vp80MwY2AzP0ISEcLM5OQ=)_**

Thank you again for your support. By working together, I know we can win this race and finally start to build a Florida that works for ALL Floridians.

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg, FL 33731
United States

name: Sam Langheim
subject: I just need a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
We have an important FEC deadline coming up & Brad needs your help

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46993945/352634018/-774467154?refcode=abd_em_fr_2022_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=bd_em_fr_2022.06.25_b2_deadline_x_f1_s1_c1__all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGZhOTM0OS01OGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeNql1zb8nIKG56EEngkoN5mgSQIaadGIHUYFLSmt4M=)
---
Team,

Sam Langheim here, Brad’s finance director. I’ll get right to the point because I know how busy you are. We have a critically important deadline coming up with the Federal Election Committee, and it is more important than ever for us to reach our fundraising goal. If we don’t reach this goal, our chances at keeping a Capital Insurrectionist out of Congress start to shrink in a truly dangerous way. And you know as well as I do that this is not a risk Wisconsin's 3rd District can afford to take.

**[We have a critical FEC deadline in less than a week, and we need to raise $10,000 by then to stay on track. As one of my top supporters, can you chip in $25 to make sure we don’t fall short?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46993946/352634020/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.06.25_b2_deadline_X_F1_S1_C1__all&utm_campaign=bd_em_fr_2022.06.25_b2_deadline_x_f1_s1_c1__all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGZhOTM0OS01OGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeNql1zb8nIKG56EEngkoN5mgSQIaadGIHUYFLSmt4M=)**

It’s times like these that we all need to ask ourselves what we can do to be a small part of the change we want to see in the world. Not long ago we watched in horror as our great nation went down a dangerous and extremist path, and it took us years to dig ourselves out of that dark hole. If we let far-right extremists like Derrick Van Orden into Congress we risk going down that path once again and throwing away all of the progress we poured our blood, sweat, and tears into.

clean_body: We have an important FEC deadline coming up & Brad needs your help | = Team, Sam Langheim here, Brad’s finance director. I’ll get right to the point because I know how busy you are. We have a critically important deadline coming up with the Federal Election Committee, and it is more important than ever for us to reach our fundraising goal. If we don’t reach this goal, our chances at keeping a Capital Insurrectionist out of Congress start to shrink in a truly dangerous way. And you know as well as I do that this is not a risk Wisconsin's 3rd District can afford to take. = It’s times like these that we all need to ask ourselves what we can do to be a small part of the change we want to see in the world. Not long ago we watched in horror as our great nation went down a dangerous and extremist path, and it took us years to dig ourselves out of that dark hole. If we let far-right extremists like Derrick Van Orden into Congress we risk going down that path once again and throwing away all of the progress we poured our blood, sweat, and tears into. | = = = = = = So much is on the line in this election- a woman’s autonomy over her body, LGBTQ+ rights, a fight between those who want sensible gun laws and those who want to make machine guns easier to buy than alcohol. body:
Decades of protections for abortion rights gone.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46994188/352634585/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220626RR_RR_SB_30DO_5_NG_N_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmZhOTM0OS01OGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z3IJUDTbtGkp_Bm5iho8jq1rq-G3bE2mD8r3C7C8NWU=) Breaking news, Peter.

**Today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, stripping away decades of protections for abortion rights.** With this decision, we’re likely to see total abortion bans in several states. Even right here in Ohio, _Republicans are ready to pass a trigger bill to ban abortion, even for cases of rape and incest._

It’s time to protect reproductive rights permanently. We need the Women’s Health Protection Act now more than ever. Without the protections of Roe, thousands will lose their reproductive freedom and privacy, and I will not just stand by.

[**_To protect abortion rights, we must expand our Democratic majority in Congress. With several critical House races and one of the most-watched Senate races in the nation, Ohio is key to the future of abortion rights. clean_body: Decades of protections for abortion rights gone. = Breaking news, Peter. Today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, stripping away decades of protections for abortion rights. With this decision, we’re likely to see total abortion bans in several states. Even right here in Ohio, Republicans are ready to pass a trigger bill to ban abortion, even for cases of rape and incest. It’s time to protect reproductive rights permanently. We need the Women’s Health Protection Act now more than ever. Without the protections of Roe, thousands will lose their reproductive freedom and privacy, and I will not just stand by. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = We're in unprecedented times. Mitch McConnell has already signaled the possibility of a nationwide abortion ban if the opportunity comes. I won’t let that happen. = = In solidarity, Congresswoman Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: RE: Roe v. Wade
body:
Derek, I’ve never needed your support more than today. Can you split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood so we can WIN these midterms and finally codify reproductive rights into law? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvapelosi?refcode=20220626_CGVA_Pelosi]
Derek, I need your immediate attention. Trump’s Supreme Court just ruled to rip reproductive rights away from every single woman in this country.
I don’t say this lightly, Derek: How we act TODAY will decide the future of reproductive rights.
We can either sit back and admit defeat to these far-right extremists...
Or we can RISE UP, meet this ONCE-IN-A-GENERATION moment, and marshal a response so HISTORIC that we make every last anti-choice Republican REGRET what they’ve done.
Please, Derek, I’ve never needed your support more than today. Can you split a donation of $25 between my campaign and CommonGood so we can WIN these midterms and finally codify reproductive rights into law? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvapelosi?refcode=20220626_CGVA_Pelosi]
Derek, this isn’t a normal fundraising email. And a normal response won’t suffice.
Tomorrow morning, Republican operatives will look at our results from THIS EMAIL to see whether strong Democrats like you are fired up.
If we post the same run-of-the-mill numbers, McConnell and McCarthy will think they can get away with ANYTHING.
So Derek, I’m asking you to step up in this moment of crisis. Our ONLY option is to marshal a response so historic -- 100,000 gifts before midnight -- that we DEFEAT every anti-choice Republican that made this happen, EXPAND our Majorities, and FINALLY codify our reproductive rights into law.
So Derek, can I expect to see your name on my "Pro-Choice Champion" list tomorrow morning? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvapelosi?refcode=20220626_CGVA_Pelosi]
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvapelosi?refcode=20220626_CGVA_Pelosi]DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvapelosi?refcode=20220626_CGVA_Pelosi&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvapelosi?refcode=20220626_CGVA_Pelosi&amount=35]

Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvapelosi?refcode=20220626_CGVA_Pelosi]
I know you’re livid. We both are. But in times of crisis, our ONLY response can be to stand up and fight for what’s right.
Thank you for fighting with me on the right side of history.
Nancy

We both are. But in times of crisis, our ONLY response can be to stand up and fight for what’s right. Thank you for fighting with me on the right side of history. Nancy (This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.) Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: .

name: Elaine's iPhone
subject: Sorry to bother you on a Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
---
| | Hi folks – I hate to bother you over the weekend, but I wanted you to hear directly from me on the attacks national Republicans are launching against me. Will you give me a second to set the record straight? I didn’t serve 20 years in the Navy to watch our Constitution get trampled. **I served because freedom isn't always a guarantee.** That includes the freedom to live in a democracy, and to have control over our own lives and bodies. If Republicans drag my name through the mud because of that, _then so be it._ And now, the Supreme Court is threatening to overturn our fundamental rights of privacy, contraception, and marriage equality. We're on dangerous and uncertain ground. That's why I'm going to stand up for what's right, no matter the cost. **I’m asking you to join me in this General Election fight. Will you help me set the record straight by chipping in $25 or whatever you can? I’m attaching a secure, personal link just for you:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/LuriaDeadline/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46996622/352643806/-132333526?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220626_FR_BotherYou_A0_na_U2_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTZkMjU3ZC01YmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gi5LPCl5bNJRzX46UVyCCG0pyVhHNn66bWwlIqmQZvU=)** Thanks for everything. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: As I said on MSNBC last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Friend,

Pennsylvania’s election this November is existential!

Whether it’s protecting abortion access in the Commonwealth, expanding voting rights, gun safety or lowering costs for working families— it’s all on the line.

I promised not to disappear after the US Senate primary and I meant it. I’ve already started traveling around Pennsylvania to help Democrats in swings legislative races and I’m all in to elect John Fetterman as our next US Senator and Josh Shapiro as our next Governor.

But Pennsylvania is a big state and our movement to make government work for working families needs to reach every corner.

Every ounce of support will go to help Democrats keep the Governor’s mansion, flip this US Senate seat, and flip the PA House.

After months on the road we built a movement that we can’t allow to go away. We have so much to do.

[I’m humbly asking you to chip in $22 or whatever you can to our travel fund to help us get to every county we can to help Democrats this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46997254/352646244/-180956798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJhNTA5Yi01Y2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_lXeLJK95Ge83RbJLBljZuPX3V39p9IE1Lglwgiis7A=)

clean_body: Friend, Pennsylvania’s election this November is existential! Whether it’s protecting abortion access in the Commonwealth, expanding voting rights, gun safety or lowering costs for working families— it’s all on the line. I promised not to disappear after the US Senate primary and I meant it. I’ve already started traveling around Pennsylvania to help Democrats in swings legislative races and I’m all in to elect John Fetterman as our next US Senator and Josh Shapiro as our next Governor. But Pennsylvania is a big state and our movement to make government work for working families needs to reach every corner. Every ounce of support will go to help Democrats keep the Governor’s mansion, flip this US Senate seat, and flip the PA House. After months on the road we built a movement that we can’t allow to go away. We have so much to do. = = = = = = = Let’s get to work, Malcolm Kenyatta * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 3254 Philadelphia, PA 19107 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:

The end of the Second Quarter is fast approaching, and Liz Cheney and her comrades are watching closely.

_Unfortunately, I have not yet hit my $75,000 fundraising goal_.

And frankly, this has become the MOST IMPORTANT FUNDRAISING DEADLINE I will face this election.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: SUPREME COURT OVERTURNS ROE V. WADE
body:
Life is winning in America.

Life is winning in America.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zss3tn4l453phja9mr6p9ktur5d4t505sr1iu7p0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
We achieved the impossible.
---
Thanks to your support, your prayers, and your refusal to give up, _Roe v. Wade_ has been officially **OVERTURNED** by the Supreme Court!
---
_Friend, I cannot believe I just typed those words._
---
**I’m crying tears of joy thinking of the millions of babies who now have the chance to __live__!**
---
But we cannot forget that our fight is not over...
---
The issue of abortion will now be brought to all 50 states in America, and we need your help fighting to ensure that LIFE wins across the nation.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help us keep up the fight to protect LIFE and watch our NEW video that details the fight that lies ahead for the pro-life movement.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq60h34ui1un0avuvgg0i7ve52u35etok2frhiq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziii6sepbgvpf315h3css9kd290lrc6d4pf20f9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z38fvsgomiqnudvfjvhn8a3v96mfbmc6q9hm64sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znrbufbtivqjomkdk7k925n847bcr17r9qekmfu8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8f1is0lkbh2c9f8todjbgrl06nu1r4slrv9i2c8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkb5pt011hb65cdi0gb7iv303pjsthqu2v1gba40_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3n1ueshqh7pl9gsta1aj1c72u13v6b4tno70tgg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z15v1fhacod17701rvpb7oummdid9m8volp0or88_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---
Unfortunately, not all of our country is celebrating today.
---
Pro-abortion activists are FURIOUS that every state now has the right to decide whether to protect little babies in the womb capable of smiling, yawning, feeling pain, and responding to their mothers’ voice.
---
I hope that we can now finally put to rest the ridiculous notion that the pro-abortion lobby is “pro-_choice_.”
---
Pro-abortion activists don’t want Americans to choose whether or not to protect life... instead, they want to FORCE every state to accept a national policy of abortion on demand up until the moment of birth.
---
They want _ZERO_ _RESTRICTIONS_ on abortion – and they will fight to ensure they get their way.
---
_But never forget: despite all the money, celebrity endorsements, and political resources the Big Abortion Lobby had at their disposal, our pro-life movement of grassroots donors like YOU just beat them!_
---
Now I need your help to beat them again as we prepare for the imminent abortion battles that will ensue across the country.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help us keep up the fight to protect LIFE and watch our NEW video that details the fight that lies ahead for the pro-life movement.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2b7o2f4cgo8cepvemf6fpms2v15l4uhuea37h2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z434r57unnsr4lnh90hgf3m7mstvgf7agf5p218g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imco75c5h2bs)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates.
---

Friend, Roe v. Wade is hanging on by a thread.
Despite nearly 50 years of legal precedent, the Supreme Court's ultraconservative justices just officially struck it down – ripping away the most basic right to make our own decisions about our own bodies.
Without Roe, abortion is all but entirely banned in at least 26 states, and Mitch McConnell says a _national_ abortion ban is on the table. **Make no mistake: The lives and health of millions of people are now at serious risk.**
**But polls show that two-thirds of Americans support Roe v. Wade, so we need your help to send a clear message to extremist GOP lawmakers like McConnell that we won't sit back and let them take our country backward.**

**As Kirsten fights tirelessly to protect reproductive freedom, she's still looking for another 13 responses from your area before midnight – and yours is still missing, friend. Please, let her know now:**
**Do you support Roe v. Wade?**

name: Troy Newman
subject: BREAKING: Uncharted territory
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9jz1uxCAYBU9jd7bg48dsQREpcrcpokgpEWDYJcEGAd5cP2wOEGm6V7yZTW5209iOQQICQBw4RgxRPlNmLtyBZloIo4kfKNLRlTYXl08Tg9VH0_Xbp2LdbNM-3qVduAGPhTdcGGAXLqyliF4Y8tYYa8bPq7rqEMNxe9O7k6V5VarSTqUybcmYqvgEHVAwRnlvLdeBvAywdlJ2RbeQjqm4ak_XPR6Pfvycivo6D_UMUJ6oXFLNzrZ-M-lpIZhizDiA8BxzPJD1bLuq6eziA3l9_1hBiAWPRW75J8QYKl967G3vpn9h7V_RX2YOZ34)
---
Dear Fellow American, **Did you see the U.S. Supreme Court’s ruling on _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health_? ** This decision is a good first step – and a victory that deserves to be celebrated! But Fellow American, this also poses a great challenge for Pro-Life Champions like you and me. Abortion Extremists will pivot in this post-Roe country. They won’t stop targeting unborn lives with their deceptive practices. Even President Biden is attempting to sign an executive order to protect the continued killing of the precious unborn! That’s why it’s critical to continue Operation Rescue’s lifesaving efforts in this defining moment. **[_Will you give your best gift now to help continue the lifesaving work of exposing the Abortion Cartel and holding them accountable for their crimes?_](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9jz1uxCAYBU9jd7bg48dsQREpcrcpokgpEWDYJcEGAd5cP2wOEGm6V7yZTW5209iOQQICQBw4RgxRPlNmLtyBZloIo4kfKNLRlTYXl08Tg9VH0_Xbp2LdbNM-3qVduAGPhTdcGGAXLqyliF4Y8tYYa8bPq7rqEMNxe9O7k6V5VarSTqUybcmYqvgEHVAwRnlvLdeBvAywdlJ2RbeQjqm4ak_XPR6Pfvycivo6D_UMUJ6oXFLNzrZ-M-lpIZhizDiA8BxzPJD1bLuq6eziA3l9_1hBiAWPRW75J8QYKl967G3vpn9h7V_RX2YOZ34)**
---
[**Support Operation Rescue Now**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9jz1uxCAYBU9jd7bg48dsQREpcrcpokgpEWDYJcEGAd5cP2wOEGm6V7yZTW5209iOQQICQBw4RgxRPlNmLtyBZloIo4kfKNLRlTYXl08Tg9VH0_Xbp2LdbNM-3qVduAGPhTdcGGAXLqyliF4Y8tYYa8bPq7rqEMNxe9O7k6V5VarSTqUybcmYqvgEHVAwRnlvLdeBvAywdlJ2RbeQjqm4ak_XPR6Pfvycivo6D_UMUJ6oXFLNzrZ-M-lpIZhizDiA8BxzPJD1bLuq6eziA3l9_1hBiAWPRW75J8QYKl967G3vpn9h7V_RX2YOZ34)
---
I don’t want to diminish this significant victory for the Pro-Life movement. It truly is remarkable – the ruling we have all prayed would come! But let’s not forget one important thing ... **America is still not abortion-free.** The states now have the power to determine their abortion laws. And while some states will enact laws that protect life, you can count on the Abortion Cartel attacking Operation Rescue and changing its tactics to continue reaching and profiting off vulnerable women and unborn lives. Now is not the time to take a victory lap. We must stay vigilant. **[_Your gift right now will continue critical rescue operations in Pro-Abortion states and hold Abortion Extremists accountable for their illegal activity._](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9jz1uxCAYBU9jd7bg48dsQREpcrcpokgpEWDYJcEGAd5cP2wOEGm6V7yZTW5209iOQQICQBw4RgxRPlNmLtyBZloIo4kfKNLRlTYXl08Tg9VH0_Xbp2LdbNM-3qVduAGPhTdcGGAXLqyliF4Y8tYYa8bPq7rqEMNxe9O7k6V5VarSTqUybcmYqvgEHVAwRnlvLdeBvAywdlJ2RbeQjqm4ak_XPR6Pfvycivo6D_UMUJ6oXFLNzrZ-M-lpIZhizDiA8BxzPJD1bLuq6eziA3l9_1hBiAWPRW75J8QYKl967G3vpn9h7V_RX2YOZ34)**
---
[**Support Operation Rescue Now**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9jz1uxCAYBU9jd7bg48dsQREpcrcpokgpEWDYJcEGAd5cP2wOEGm6V7yZTW5209iOQQICQBw4RgxRPlNmLtyBZloIo4kfKNLRlTYXl08Tg9VH0_Xbp2LdbNM-3qVduAGPhTdcGGAXLqyliF4Y8tYYa8bPq7rqEMNxe9O7k6V5VarSTqUybcmYqvgEHVAwRnlvLdeBvAywdlJ2RbeQjqm4ak_XPR6Pfvycivo6D_UMUJ6oXFLNzrZ-M-lpIZhizDiA8BxzPJD1bLuq6eziA3l9_1hBiAWPRW75J8QYKl967G3vpn9h7V_RX2YOZ34)
---
Because this is new, uncharted territory for the Pro-Life movement. And with your continued support, your Operation Rescue stands ready to enforce the laws, expose abortion crimes, and save more lives from the deception of Big Abortion. **[_So please, give your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more now. And continue to rescue more unborn babies from the horror of abortion and expose extremists for their grisly practices._](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9jz1uxCAYBU9jd7bg48dsQREpcrcpokgpEWDYJcEGAd5cP2wOEGm6V7yZTW5209iOQQICQBw4RgxRPlNmLtyBZloIo4kfKNLRlTYXl08Tg9VH0_Xbp2LdbNM-3qVduAGPhTdcGGAXLqyliF4Y8tYYa8bPq7rqEMNxe9O7k6V5VarSTqUybcmYqvgEHVAwRnlvLdeBvAywdlJ2RbeQjqm4ak_XPR6Pfvycivo6D_UMUJ6oXFLNzrZ-M-lpIZhizDiA8BxzPJD1bLuq6eziA3l9_1hBiAWPRW75J8QYKl967G3vpn9h7V_RX2YOZ34)** With your help, we won’t stop until every single unborn life is protected in this country. Thank you for your faithful support. God bless, — Troy

body:
Marco Rubio just called a bill discussing a woman's right to choose "barbaric"
| | |
---
**Friend, Marco Rubio just called a bill discussing a woman's right to choose _"barbaric" –_ and he cheered on the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46997903/352648626/232639193?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3567-su-nd&sustainers=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmNiN2Q4ZC01ZWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAI1szoeRV_nJ10zdHCHRQwAvtsFIVJfOL48ckOGxvg=&emci=b483fdef-32f3-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=8fcb7d8d-5ef5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
Banning abortions for women and girls who have suffered sexual abuse, sex trafficking, rape, incest and more? _That’s_ barbaric.

Undoing nearly 50 years of precedent and forcing our country back to when women didn’t have autonomy over their own bodies and health care decisions?_T_ _hat’s_ barbaric.
Friend, I am sick and tired of politicians like Marco Rubio telling women what to do with their bodies while turning a blind eye to the gun violence, lack of affordable health care and so much more, affecting the lives of millions of Americans across this country.
**To me, Rubio’s grotesque record speaks for itself (and I know _exactly_ what grade I would give him) – but I want to hear what supporters like you think about Rubio’s record on reproductive rights. So please, let me know: **

Val Demings

name: JD Vance
subject: Sanctity of Life -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ohioans for JD Inc
body:
The wrong has been corrected [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6184%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=yygSOxBis%2bt7fhKPtYAvPQ&sysid=1)
The wrong has been corrected

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63081%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dxzdJj4I5reBU5QRpS3a7g&sysid=1)
---
Friends,

Today is a historic and joyous day in American history as the Supreme Court ruled to end the moral catastrophe that is Roe V. Wade.
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63081%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dxzdJj4I5reBU5QRpS3a7g&sysid=1)
The tragic 1973 decision, out of thin air, took away the right to life for the Unborn. Since the inception of Roe, millions of innocent Americans have been stripped of the right to life - A right outlined by our Founders in the Declaration of Independence and given by God to every one of us.
| [**CHIP IN FOR LIFE HERE >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63082%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v1mz4RdIbO1HqGFkseMLog&sysid=1)
---

This is truly a momentous occasion for the millions of Americans who have fought so long to protect the rights of the unborn.

**Unfortunately, our fight is far from over ...**

**Radical, Pro-Abortion** politicians (Tim Ryan included) are doing everything in their power to ensure Roe V. Wade remains the law of the land. Pro-Abortion Democrats have threatened openly and repeatedly to pack the court and have failed to condemn **_GROSS_** intimidation attempts of Supreme Court Justices (in front of their own homes) by their **_CRAZIEST_** activists.

[**CONTINUE THE FIGHT FOR LIFE >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63083%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m8t%2bEN64sGlcTKx2F9JHOQ&sysid=1)
_The stakes are even higher now. We must protect the rights of the Unborn. We have to flip the Senate to protect life._

Tim Ryan has made clear he’ll fight to protect Roe V. Wade. If Democrats win the Senate, they will codify Roe into federal law - [**that’s why I need your help.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63084%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VsArG3emPy25AwixM8nX7A&sysid=1)

God Bless,

JD Vance

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: The power of talking with voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Hi Peter, Eric Sorensen, meteorologist and Democrat running for Congress in IL-17. [With Election Day around the corner, our team’s focus is talking to as many Democratic voters as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46985819/352602319/1265397067?refcode=genemjune26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDFkZDhjZi00MGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqDa4I9-inb4tIegkQJf3SUZofXMV68b3Daox9AMy24=) Phone banking, texting, and canvassing are all par for the course, and I LOVE it! Between Zoom events this week, I was working on my favorite challenge: phone banking the undecided voters. These voters have already spoken with one of our volunteers, and now it’s my job to bring them home! I love it, it’s the best game. I wanted to share a great conversation with a voter in Peoria. Irene hadn’t yet decided which party’s ballot she was going to pull since she didn’t feel like she had a strong opinion on any of the Democratic races, and there’s a competitive local Republican primary for sheriff. I asked her what she was looking for in her next member of Congress, and she said she was so tired of the bickering, she wants someone who’s guided by values and principles, not politics. I completely agree, and told her that that’s why I’m running as the science-guided candidate! We talked about what it meant to actually “represent” our community, and how important it was to work for the public interest. At the end of our conversation, she told me that she now realized how important her vote in our Congressional race was, and said: “I’m so glad you called me, I’m pulling that Democratic ballot so I can vote for YOU!” [_Like I said, it’s the best game :)_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46985820/352602320/1265397067?refcode=genemjune26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDFkZDhjZi00MGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqDa4I9-inb4tIegkQJf3SUZofXMV68b3Daox9AMy24=) Throughout this campaign, I’ve shared a lot of voter stories with you:
* Jim, the farmer in Kewanee who didn’t want to sign my petition but after our conversation told me “I think I’ve found a Democrat who makes sense!”
* Betty, the Moline voter who’s expecting me to explain how Congress works, just like I did with the weather
* The three farmers and lifelong Republicans who told me that they appreciated that I brought a scientific perspective, not a political one. They told me that they trusted me, that they thought I would actually work for them in Washington, and that they would be voting for me

These stories are at the heart of who I am: I’m a communicator. I’m guided by science and I love my community here. I’m proud to have earned their trust. And that’s how we’re going to keep IL-17 blue. Peter, if this is the kind of leadership you’d like to see in Congress, I’d ask that you chip in today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-june-em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46985821/352602321/1265397067?refcode=genemjune26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDFkZDhjZi00MGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqDa4I9-inb4tIegkQJf3SUZofXMV68b3Daox9AMy24=) Thank you for all that you do. \- E \--
Eric Sorensen
Meteorologist | Candidate for Congress (IL-17)
309-306-1717
[Donate Online](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46985822/352602322/758105924?refcode=essiggenemjune26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDFkZDhjZi00MGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqDa4I9-inb4tIegkQJf3SUZofXMV68b3Daox9AMy24=) | [Learn More](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46985823/352602323/582160337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDFkZDhjZi00MGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqDa4I9-inb4tIegkQJf3SUZofXMV68b3Daox9AMy24=&emci=069c3eae-bff4-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6d1dd8cf-40f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=18052858)

We’re expecting him to report millions of dollars raised from his special interest allies after June 30, and we can’t let him go unmatched. That’s why it’s critical that we send a message to Ron Johnson that this team is strong and ready to elect a changemaker in November. name: Tim
subject: early morning ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]Tim Ryan coffee

Hi there, sorry for emailing you so early on a Sunday, but I’m
up and worried about our upcoming FEC deadline.

You see, we’re just a few days away from our first End-of-Quarter deadline
of the General Election, and honestly, our fundraising numbers aren’t
where they need to be.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]I know it’s early, but this couldn’t wait. Will you do me a favor and
start your day by chipping in toward our $300,000 End-of-Quarter goal
before next week’s FEC deadline?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1011&amount=25&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]Donate

Every morning, I wake up, brew a cup of coffee and check our latest
fundraising numbers.

That’s the reality of running for Senate against millionaire JD Vance—you
have no choice but to keep up with the loads of GOP dark money flooding
into Ohio to boost his campaign.

Luckily, this grassroots team has always had my back. You’re committed to
cutting workers in on the deal and keeping another anti-choice,
anti-democracy extremist like JD Vance out of the Senate.

That’s what keeps me going. You keep all of us
going—but right now we could really use your help to get back on track
before next week’s FEC End-of-Quarter deadline.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1012&amount=25&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]So, before you go on with the rest of your day, can you chip in toward
our $300,000 End-of-Quarter goal to defeat JD Vance and expand our
Democratic Senate majority?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15466?t=1008&amount=30&akid=4329%2E3611125%2EXRx7NE ]Other Amount

Thanks for all of your help,

Tim

name: Katie Hill
subject: Re: Fighting back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yq1hsBoWgstMAcnt5Qsuzr1W4fK-5wCFekKn2WWKwNw=/51s6w6irBdFF473uekTx8-3VtNi_i5UWICoNs34KMfg=)
---
I'm reaching out again because I'm ANGRY. I'm angry that a FIFTY YEAR precedent was overturned. I'm angry that it was overturned by justices appointed by presidents who _lost the popular vote_. I'm angry that, once more, women's bodies don't belong to them.
[**So, I have to ask once more: will you help us elect more pro-choice women who will fight like hell for us? We won 't stop until every woman has the protections they need and deserve.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yq1hsBoWgstMAcnt5Qsuzr1W4fK-5wCFekKn2WWKwNw=/WC1apkF3bFH1mAu6QO-5mf3hKEVuoKd6w9VnGAszoIU=?refcode=X_062622_RoevWade_C)
Thank you!
-- _Katie_

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Katie Hill** <team@her-time.com>
Date: Fri, June 24th 2022 at 7:55am
Subject: i'm livid

It's happened.
The Supreme Court handed down the decision to overturn Roe v. Wade.
**Across the country, millions of women no longer have the reproductive freedom to make choices about THEIR OWN BODIES. **Abortion rights are no longer protected federally. In five states, pre-Roe abortion bans will once again be the norm. In 13 states, trigger laws have already made it illegal -- or are about to.
**_This cannot stand._**
[**That 's why at HER Time, we're doing what we do best: electing unapologetically pro-choice women up and down the ballot who will do everything they can to protect us. Will you help us by chipping in now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yq1hsBoWgstMAcnt5Qsuzr1W4fK-5wCFekKn2WWKwNw=/WC1apkF3bFH1mAu6QO-5mf3hKEVuoKd6w9VnGAszoIU=?refcode=X_062622_RoevWade_C)
In solidarity,
-- _Katie_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yq1hsBoWgstMAcnt5Qsuzr1W4fK-5wCFekKn2WWKwNw=/WC1apkF3bFH1mAu6QO-5mf3hKEVuoKd6w9VnGAszoIU=?refcode=X_062622_RoevWade_C)

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time**[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yq1hsBoWgstMAcnt5Qsuzr1W4fK-5wCFekKn2WWKwNw=/2ld9ZqXKCQm9OuTY_RZGX-dRxNpl8KmmSljuj1ZZeSk=?refcode=footer)**, and**[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yq1hsBoWgstMAcnt5Qsuzr1W4fK-5wCFekKn2WWKwNw=/51s6w6irBdFF473uekTx8-3VtNi_i5UWICoNs34KMfg=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziqfqak93veatulu9p43p7ng8e82dhduggfcem0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlcti39pb4e1g68chle6on0ob7cgrj6o3imhpm4o70m1r69ptgeuq6as346dp6fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmmom0shncoqm1cr2cuobapbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5443b3sqms1vk1bon06q4ci6mu1900pvi2pdqk0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu6hq2vu15pddao6rb9dsso0kr3dooionu2280j8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6r43n1h3a33sbj6ehc985g54j3phpa6dvo3d6fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl71o7r3h9504j2vbdlj9nluulrpfg3fc9idd7u0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zug2qj44qo945mik59a2loqme4mal1v95ebhthpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpojvh4na4b993sandpf1tpb27ug63k25e202i00_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zceiuiikqvsujjndv9g5pcp76286ona7g8lvl140_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpv6s3d3biip0omg7r30ac9tq06porourici57a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1r93a7hsfk8hpaqn30g76hefss68jie8mppjjbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj1l5c6uqo1tv9ebk1o03084kp2ela65qdk57pjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56fef77mtq035lpe5hn2bngdhda17clooocp478_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za2lquick1jd3oimbigselgshvo5mk1seolej4pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0r7vhroni4fkqtsommgg2vue01ilh0gps8a8clo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbh8hhhua9e5or7b1vee59609llj2ns6tmn81qt8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zojfov1977inav43d14qqaihtlan6cd6hqum1i8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr5bn73q108tjcetbvd8or968okr5q1ncgidabvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjfl3n0onf4bq63phrtht903nsrdfv5qr4fq6kqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeijpc49af6khhuk2873mh4m80528mipmgg6p35o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9imeob2c5h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zvllddj7b0g685n74qdpodfdsh2n88rkag94gs3o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Delaware Dem Update via Team LBR
subject: No margin for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47001545/352662580/469547429?refcode=em_fr_220626eoq_eoq_ddu_actives_4_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDQ4MWUxZS02OGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1olALzCyfCqL3HzmzGLk1fKiOzKNcUZjzdJMwv19zwQ=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47001546/352662581/469547429?refcode=em_fr_220626eoq_eoq_ddu_actives_4_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDQ4MWUxZS02OGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1olALzCyfCqL3HzmzGLk1fKiOzKNcUZjzdJMwv19zwQ=) The GOP took advantage of the recent redistricting cycle and gerrymandered key Congressional districts across America, which means there's even less margin for error now if we want to hold the House.

Recent polls — as well as their flip of a swing district in Texas earlier this month — have given Republicans every reason to believe that November will be strong for them. **They even think they can turn states like Delaware red.**

If we lose the House, all the progress that LBR and her Democratic colleagues have made in Washington will screech to a halt. The best thing you can do today to make sure that doesn’t happen is to make your first donation to LBR’s campaign before June 30. She’s running at the top of the ticket this year, and close down-ballot races could be decided by how well Democrats turn out voters across the state.

**[Will you chip in today? Recent polls — as well as their flip of a swing district in Texas earlier this month — have given Republicans every reason to believe that November will be strong for them. They even think they can turn states like Delaware red. If we lose the House, all the progress that LBR and her Democratic colleagues have made in Washington will screech to a halt. name: Team Cooper
subject: SIGN ON: Call for federal action on abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We need you to speak out. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47001918/352665035/823540626?refcode=ea.0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAwOTUwYS02OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o02D4639ZNrf9cXXtHULW3XuG_8S9m0LD-DeRxxbp0I=&emci=91d615db-faf3-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, there’s no more time to lose. Now that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Democrats in Washington must act to codify abortion rights at the federal level. **[Roy Cooper is calling for immediate action to secure reproductive rights. Add your name beside his to demand our leaders do whatever it takes to protect this fundamental human right >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47001919/352665036/610263888?refcode=ea.0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAwOTUwYS02OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o02D4639ZNrf9cXXtHULW3XuG_8S9m0LD-DeRxxbp0I=&emci=91d615db-faf3-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47001920/352665037/610263888?refcode=ea.0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAwOTUwYS02OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o02D4639ZNrf9cXXtHULW3XuG_8S9m0LD-DeRxxbp0I=&emci=91d615db-faf3-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0200950a-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)**
---
It’s clear that most Americans believe that abortion care should be safe, accessible, and legal. Our elected officials have a duty to heed the will of the people and defend reproductive health care against far-right attacks.
Roy has already vetoed anti-choice legislation passed by the Republican-controlled legislature. He is committed to doing everything possible to continue protecting reproductive rights for North Carolinians, but this goes far beyond our state.
If the GOP takes back control in Washington, D.C., after the next presidential election, they could move to ban abortion nationwide. We need Democratic leaders to act NOW, before Republicans have that chance.
What it comes down to is this: **Reproductive rights are fundamental, and _we will not go back._**

clean_body: We need you to speak out. | Peter, there’s no more time to lose. Now that the Supreme Court has overturned Roe v. Wade , Democrats in Washington must act to codify abortion rights at the federal level. | It’s clear that most Americans believe that abortion care should be safe, accessible, and legal. Our elected officials have a duty to heed the will of the people and defend reproductive health care against far-right attacks. Roy has already vetoed anti-choice legislation passed by the Republican-controlled legislature. He is committed to doing everything possible to continue protecting reproductive rights for North Carolinians, but this goes far beyond our state. If the GOP takes back control in Washington, D.C., after the next presidential election, they could move to ban abortion nationwide. We need Democratic leaders to act NOW, before Republicans have that chance. What it comes down to is this: Reproductive rights are fundamental, and we will not go back. name: Team Benson
subject: the contrast is clear
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend: Kristina Karamo will use the Secretary of State’s office as a bully pulpit to support criminalizing a woman’s right to choose. She will abuse the power of the office to lie, spread conspiracy theories, and continue the extremist assaults on liberty.

The contrast couldn’t be more obvious.

Jocelyn is pro-choice and pro-women’s rights. She will continue to fight to protect our most important rights and liberties.

Who do you want serving and protecting every Michigander’s rights and freedoms? Help make sure Kristina Karamo never has the chance to take away a woman’s right to choose by supporting Jocelyn now. >>

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=062522

-Team Benson

Begin Forwarded Message:

Friend,

When the Dobbs v Jackson Women’s Health Organization draft opinion that would overturn Roe v. Wade leaked in early May, I said “it’s all the same fight.” Now more than ever, this bears repeating.

The fight for democracy is the fight for freedom is the fight for choice.

The direct result of the Supreme Court’s final ruling announced today is that millions of women in Michigan lose nearly every right to make choices about their own bodies and futures -- and could be subject to a heavily restrictive anti-choice law that dates back nearly a century.

This is not an isolated decision or a single moment. This the cumulative effect of a 40-year assault on our rights by extremists on the far right, from the Federalist Society and law schools, to circuit courts and the three most recent appointees to the Supreme Court. Candidates around the country for every office are using their platforms to attack womens’ rights, regardless of the office’s responsibility.

These extremists and their hand-picked judges will go even further. They will strip as many federal protections as possible from those who need them most. They will "return" these decisions to the states, where in many cases the deck is already stacked due to partisan gerrymandering, judicial appointments, and voter suppression.

The Dobbs decision essentially eliminates the constitutional right to privacy, which opens the door to the elimination of many other protections and freedoms - from contraception to marriage equality. And today’s opinion sets the stage to eliminate voting as a fundamental constitutional right, and all the protections that come with it.

This is not some far off apocalyptic vision of the future – it’s what could happen in the next five years.

So what can we do about it? State and local elections matter more than ever. And having fair, accurate elections takes on even more importance. The majority of Americans support a woman’s right to choose. It’s up to all of us to make sure election results reflect that majority.

The preservation of every constitutional right we have left depends on whether we exercise the right to vote – and make sure every vote is counted.

Like I said: The fight for democracy is the fight for freedom is the fight for choice.

It’s all the same fight.

I’m grateful that you’re with me in it.

-Jocelyn

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=062522

name: Letitia James
subject: Congress must codify reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
| | **_BREAKING: Roe v. Wade has fallen_**
---
After nearly 50 years of being the law of the land, Roe v. Wade has been overturned. **I need 5,000 fearless fighters to join me and sign my petition by MIDNIGHT to demand that reproductive rights be codified!**
---
| | [Add my name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47002550/352667550/-49099860?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk577-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2YwYjliYy02OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u34MxHtvhOnVCKzvznrnQXR9SDVmZvyYDsJUVVZtOpM=&emci=3eda4d4d-01f4-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=37f0b9bc-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter,

I know you’ve heard the news: the Supreme Court has voted to overturn Roe v. Wade. The right to safe abortions for millions of people in several states has been stripped.

I’ll level with you: This is terrifying. For the first time in generations, young Americans have _fewer_ rights than their grandparents.We have fought so hard to secure the right to choose, and it’s devastating to see it taken away.

**But I will always stand with you in this fight for reproductive rights, even if that means fighting for another 50 years. That’s why I’m calling on Congress to codify reproductive rights as soon as possible, and I hope you’ll join me. [Peter, if you believe that all Americans should have the agency to make decisions about their bodies, add your name to my petition now! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47002551/352667551/-49099860?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk577-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2YwYjliYy02OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u34MxHtvhOnVCKzvznrnQXR9SDVmZvyYDsJUVVZtOpM=&emci=3eda4d4d-01f4-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=37f0b9bc-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

Now that Roe v. Wade has been successfully overturned, it is yet another burden that falls primarily on poor, Black, and brown people – but I will do everything in my power to prevent this. That’s why, months ago as attacks on reproductive rights continued to mount across the country, I called for the creation of an abortion fund in New York.

**This fund will help provide resources for our health care clinics that will be more critical than ever before.****** But there is so much more I intend to accomplish for reproductive freedom over the next four years. This is not a perfect solution, which is why we must do everything in our power to urge Congress to take action right now.

**Peter, without countrywide abortion rights, inequality will only continue to increase.[So please, will you add your name to my petition now to call on Congress to codify reproductive rights, ensuring that all Americans have the right to decide their own destinies?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47002553/352667553/-49099860?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk577-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2YwYjliYy02OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u34MxHtvhOnVCKzvznrnQXR9SDVmZvyYDsJUVVZtOpM=&emci=3eda4d4d-01f4-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=37f0b9bc-69f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Please see – FW: URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships?
body:
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl4h77kflt2emlg66m4n6uuingkckveuj3n6hplg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9im9oj4s9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0tbme9om4ojieap32chks9gj8ttk6qrb4oll64p7dcr46kr68ptkm9hn8cj261jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8r6cd74mmqefclhcpqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsh6poqlgm4hrlsun4gsmhr2125ommp2qsg49c68_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9im9oj4s9h2bs) Fellow Conservative, I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know **the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zog2l87gp1rj9lse98ae61rd6qmlfquv7gmsp2co_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9im9oj4s9h2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1hs5arv74i8f54nj2dorun4do768kio2jhifb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9im9oj4s9h2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
* * *
**From:** Bryan Bernys
**To:** Morton Blackwell
**Subject:** URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships? Morton, I just got confirmation that we can move the National Youth Leadership School to the university auditorium. That takes care of the classroom space issues we had. But now there’s a financial issue. With the increase in travel costs, we’ve used up everything in the scholarship fund for students’ travel and hotel rooms. My team still have **50 more applications** to process from students who want to come to the training. Is there any room left in the budget for more student travel scholarships? I don’t want to have to tell my team to turn students away who can’t afford to come, but there’s no other option if we can’t get more scholarship funding. Please let me know how to proceed as soon as possible. Respectfully, Bryan \--
**Bryan Bernys**
Vice President for the Campus Leadership Program
Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z43cmnoeb35rn0qp0da7karemneu02g96pfucs20_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cdh6ap72cjh649fg)

| Ronny Jackson claims that President Biden is “totally disconnected from reality."

But, President Biden isn’t the one who...
* Tried to overthrow our democracy and orchestrate a coup on January 6th.
* Was caught drinking on the job as White House Physician, more than once.
* Is awaiting trial before the House Ethics Committee for allegedly misusing campaign funds.
* Voted no on COVID-19 relief and stimulus checks.
* Voted against the Baby Formula Bill.
* Claims rap music is the real cause of school shootings.

**The list is endless.**

Clearly, Ronny Jackson is the one detached from the real world and what our Texas communities need.

[**Will you support my campaign and show Ronny Jackson that he needs a reality check?**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=05a640f791&e=4712f71bea)

Virginia Democrats are the only thing that stands in their way. name: Gov. Jared Polis (personal)
subject: A bittersweet anniversary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLIS FOR COLORADO
body:
Team — seven years ago today, I was on the steps of the U.S.Supreme Court, awaiting the decision in Obergefell v. Hodges, the landmark gay marriage case.

Team — seven years ago today, I was on the steps of the U.S.Supreme Court, awaiting the decision in Obergefell v. Hodges, the landmark gay marriage case. Thousands of us were gathered there — almost all of us on the side of love — truly not knowing which way the Court would rule. And when the announcement came down that we’d won, the response from the crowd was unlike anything I’d experienced. It was a sheer moment of powerful joy. The Supreme Court had validated that our relationships were worthy of the cherished institution of marriage. Today, we celebrate this landmark victory and the countless LGBTQ couples and families whose lives it changed for the better. But it’s also a bittersweet day, because we know that the Supreme Court’s decision to strike down Roe v. Wade — in addition to being an outrageous assault on our freedoms — puts the Supreme Court’s precedent on marriage equality in serious jeopardy as well. That’s a horrifying prospect, but we are not helpless against it. Here in Colorado, I want to assure you that for as long as I am Governor, marriage equality — just like the right to choose — will remain the law of the land. Here in Colorado, we believe in freedom: the freedom to be who you are, marry who you love, and decide what you do with your own body. **But since we can’t count on the Supreme Court, that means it’s up to us to elect leaders in Colorado who will defend our rights. And the fact is, in this race, I’m up against right-wing opponents who would seek to ban both abortion and gay marriage.** [**Team, elections matter. It’s as simple as that. And if you’re with me in making sure Colorado remains a place where these basic civil rights are protected, I could really use your help in this election. Will you stand with me as I keep working to build a Colorado for All?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47005079/352672349/1864533027?refcode=email_062622_bittersweetanniversary&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njc5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTQ5MWRjNy02ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7nWm-g2JxlfvkQ8iFA7C7hRds1GB_rQYX53LOefx6A=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47005080/352672350/1864533027?refcode=email_062622_bittersweetanniversary&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njc5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTQ5MWRjNy02ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7nWm-g2JxlfvkQ8iFA7C7hRds1GB_rQYX53LOefx6A=)
