subject: Reminder: Representation Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Penny Ronning for U
body:
We the People Matter
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOEv4aE74xX2DnfdGaexf1tRPFyFfAknFMPM4wcELiAhM3hxn0Ow2ldxOD0KU-6l3VPvDWNcW10mIApuyx2ZaT5dQtdMwALdc88izzaRbaxi0CcyjurjB5jzXpC52O6lUrXtNqtiu9oW2pM0QwUrzw==&c=2fPNoyQVHMdQ2X01LL-h4K0I6kLLmYSnI7EfomRwtSo0oKMip0fAFQ==&ch=BqCnCid0PUQJxSZuXM7tCvOd1jiTldJ_KbziuG2b1u133gx55eM-Ng==)
---
| We the People Matter
---
|
---
| |
---|---
|
Dear Peter,

The destructive Montana floods which have taken out bridges and left folks stranded, homeless, businesses closed, and agriculture in jeopardy point to a serious problem. According to the [American Road and Transportation Builders Association](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOEv4aE74xX2DnfdGaexf1tRPFyFfAknFMPM4wcELiAhM3hxn0Ow2lPXbHKl70oWiaMdBwVu4f36ToqAlWfqVjWNiR3KmBtfO91772TpVeIOCYRkSmeCgHgccDxXAFCcdOaeFaexTVb4gFzlB7Mc37QyBu2a72oY3ey0vyHAP0S9FZuXIA9NEQ==&c=2fPNoyQVHMdQ2X01LL-h4K0I6kLLmYSnI7EfomRwtSo0oKMip0fAFQ==&ch=BqCnCid0PUQJxSZuXM7tCvOd1jiTldJ_KbziuG2b1u133gx55eM-Ng==), Montana "has identified needed repairs on 971 bridges at an estimated cost of $709.2 million."

So it's a good thing, as [Vote Smart](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xOEv4aE74xX2DnfdGaexf1tRPFyFfAknFMPM4wcELiAhM3hxn0Ow2lPXbHKl70oWkhAcZlokFl1CRl6mh3_HmTM5Rk50qIutsJQf8FgoVSf-ZZe-uVK90ZuAbG5MNd0DTJcXj04e7NR1kmSpiOyN7VcdsmN0UAfX6FHweE86TrTacAK7I91lCK6Mdwd1AQmH2G1Hh_Rfco2gVpRvB4j6UfMWc3TLgbzU0pniXbOaxIOWgJ2G4o0hXvbgF7cPeAuE&c=2fPNoyQVHMdQ2X01LL-h4K0I6kLLmYSnI7EfomRwtSo0oKMip0fAFQ==&ch=BqCnCid0PUQJxSZuXM7tCvOd1jiTldJ_KbziuG2b1u133gx55eM-Ng==) reports, that the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act "establishes the Rebuild Rural Bridges Program and appropriates $250 million each beginning 2023 and each year through fiscal year 2026 to improve the safety and state of good repair of bridges in rural communities."

You'd think a representative who cared about rural Montana, and the safety of Montanans in general, would have voted YES on the infrastructure bill. A bill that invests in Montana through improved safety measures, high paying jobs, addressing climate change, broadband expansion, and more. But Matt Rosendale voted NO. Matt Rosendale has voted NO on 94 out of 98 votes since he has been in Congress. Montana needs better. Let's start getting things done for Montana.

Representation matters. It's time to send a Representative to Congress with a proven track record of working FOR Montanans. Please donate what you can today to help send Penny to Washington, D.C. Montana deserves her!

Picture:Crossing the Yellowstone River in Penny's car after her visit to Red Lodge.
|

| |
---

Friends,

Wyoming was founded and built on the idea of freedom, and that’s thankfully still what our state is rooted in today.

**In Wyoming, we believe in the Code of the West.** Those tenets about your word being your bond, knowing where to draw the line, some things not being for sale are all tenets that we aspire to live up to because they go to the core of who we are as a state. **I’ve worked to embody those principles and strive to follow them as I serve.**

Our people are resilient and need an honest person who is loyal to the Constitution above all else to fight for us in Washington, D.C.

clean_body: | Friends, Wyoming was founded and built on the idea of freedom, and that’s thankfully still what our state is rooted in today. In Wyoming, we believe in the Code of the West. Those tenets about your word being your bond, knowing where to draw the line, some things not being for sale are all tenets that we aspire to live up to because they go to the core of who we are as a state. I’ve worked to embody those principles and strive to follow them as I serve. Our people are resilient and need an honest person who is loyal to the Constitution above all else to fight for us in Washington, D.C. | I’m always committed to fighting for Wyoming and I’ll do it in a way that our state can be proud of. Rep. Liz Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming Our mailing address is: PO Box 3167 Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

| | Because of our emergency petition drive in the middle of the second quarter, we inevitably got distracted from raising money. Getting on the ballot after a futile GOP challenge over the prefix in my name was a huge priority. They forced us to expend a lot of resources, and my fundraising team was moved to the field for nearly a month. _**Now, we're[behind in our fundraising efforts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47012856/352690732/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2M5ZGM5NC04MmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ct8g2Xr0k1QN67Y-aQAsODosaJ4MP1YJlPJ1YzG34_E=) and might not hit our quarterly goal. We know we can get back on course on our path to defeat Jack Bergman, but,**_ _**I HAVE JUST 4 DAYS UNTIL OUR FEC DEADLINE AND I NEED TO CATCH UP.**_ Our summer expenses — **yard signs, literature for door-to-door canvassing, travel accommodations, fuel, staff salaries, volunteer resources, office supplies and space** — are piling on quickly. Let's make a deal. I will repay you with tireless effort in Congress advancing independent solutions that best fit the 1st district of Michigan. I will listen and engage with the constituency if honored to be elected. And, If you're unable to make a financial contribution at this time, get rewarded for your generosity and [buy something you need](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47012857/352690734/-519695928?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2M5ZGM5NC04MmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ct8g2Xr0k1QN67Y-aQAsODosaJ4MP1YJlPJ1YzG34_E=&emci=c1d48976-82f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=7cc9dc94-82f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) from our store!

I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. name: Herschel Walker
subject: All eyes are still on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent’s campaign.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1pt1svpfg4n8td2hicffktb3u7td5faqqu5qq28_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u3h62ojge9im4p736hge5cbjehin0sdjelpn8ob6m1onfdb1mjh3apjl66p79o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhm2qr2o3ie1j38oljc9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cdh6eo30cpgm49fg)

| | | Friend,

**Great news! We won Georgia 's Republican primary for U.S. Senate.**

I'll be the Republican nominee to face Democrat Raphael Warnock in the Senate race in November, which means this fight is heating up.

It's no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent's campaign. In the first three months of the year, my opponent raised $13.6 MILLION - _that 's $151,000 per day or $105 per minute!_

Raphael Warnock has outraised EVERY candidate in the country, which is why I'm reaching out to you now. _**[Friend, I need your help now more than ever.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4199k6slj49tgeip9tn0dumfld89vtu24uan6n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9jm0o36c5h2bs "Friend, I need your help now more than ever.")**_

_**[If you're able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it's $1 or $100, your help is critical.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsdf1fjfo81ljvqpulipoep5u23e6remt6ug22s8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c9jm0o36c5h2bs "If you’re able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it’s $1 or $100, your help is critical.")**_

We must band together to flip this crucial Senate seat in Georgia. It's up to strong conservatives like us to win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track.

Thank you for your continued support.

On to victory,

Herschel Walker

clean_body: It’s no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent’s campaign. | | | Friend, Great news! We won Georgia 's Republican primary for U.S. Senate. I'll be the Republican nominee to face Democrat Raphael Warnock in the Senate race in November, which means this fight is heating up. It's no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent's campaign. In the first three months of the year, my opponent raised $13.6 MILLION - that 's $151,000 per day or $105 per minute! Raphael Warnock has outraised EVERY candidate in the country, which is why I'm reaching out to you now. "Friend, I need your help now more than ever." "If you’re able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it’s $1 or $100, your help is critical." We must band together to flip this crucial Senate seat in Georgia. It's up to strong conservatives like us to win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track. Thank you for your continued support. On to victory, Herschel Walker | | | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. | Paid for by Stand for America PAC. The moment that DC controls our right to bodily autonomy is the moment that we begin slipping back into the 1950s. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: The issues we care about are on the ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in before our crucial FEC end-of-quarter deadline, but first, I want to let you know why it's never been more critical to keep RI-02 blue and defend our Democratic House majority.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013210/352692342/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQ3NTA2Mi04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ9oXRjdO6ws_86ZdmP940Jh6HRNeZemS4RTzVIYbqw=&emci=f714e1ea-62f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=9d475062-86f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in before our crucial FEC end-of-quarter deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013211/352692343/-1310336793?refcode=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQ3NTA2Mi04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ9oXRjdO6ws_86ZdmP940Jh6HRNeZemS4RTzVIYbqw=)** , but first, I want to let you know why it's never been more critical to keep RI-02 blue and defend our Democratic House majority.

The last few months have proven just how much is at stake this November. From gun safety legislation to reproductive rights – the issues we care about the most are on the ballot – and Rhode Islanders are demanding action. **The stakes are especially high now that the Supreme Court has both overturned _Roe v. Wade_ AND common sense gun reforms.**

As Treasurer, I worked to pass the Reproductive Privacy Act, which codified _Roe_ into Rhode Island law. And I support the Equal Access to Abortion Act because a women’s right to reproductive healthcare should not depend on what type of health insurance she has.

**In Congress, I will fight to ensure reproductive rights are protected for all by passing the Women's Health Protection Act to codify _Roe_ into federal law nationwide.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013212/352692344/-1310336793?refcode=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQ3NTA2Mi04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ9oXRjdO6ws_86ZdmP940Jh6HRNeZemS4RTzVIYbqw=)
While Rhode Islanders are demanding action to end gun violence, I've fought tirelessly for gun reform here in Rhode Island.

As State Treasurer, I divested the state’s pension from companies that make assault weapons for civilian purchase, and I've been working to restrict sales and purchases of firearm kits, components, and accessories used to assemble undetectable "ghost guns."

**In Congress, I'll continue fighting to end gun violence by supporting common-sense legislation like universal background checks, a ban on assault weapons, and red flag laws.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013213/352692345/-1310336793?refcode=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQ3NTA2Mi04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ9oXRjdO6ws_86ZdmP940Jh6HRNeZemS4RTzVIYbqw=)
My Republican opponent, Allan Fung, on the other hand, has a different record. Fung said he opposed codifying _Roe v. Wade_ in Rhode Island and was endorsed by RI Right to Life, a group that wants to make abortion illegal. Fung also received an A rating from the National Rifle Association (NRA) and opposes any kind of limitations on assault weapons.

I'll fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence and ensure every woman has the right to make her own personal reproductive health care decisions – and my record proves it. Allan Fung will put lives at risk and side with the extreme right on these critical issues.

With so much on the line this election, it's critical that we keep Rhode Island's 2nd District blue. As your congressman, I will fight for every Rhode Islander and stand up for the issues that matter most to you – but I need your help getting to Congress.

**[Will you chip in before my FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to help me keep RI-02 and our House majority blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013214/352692346/-1310336793?refcode=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220626_eoq1_fnd_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQ3NTA2Mi04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQ9oXRjdO6ws_86ZdmP940Jh6HRNeZemS4RTzVIYbqw=)**

Thank you,

Seth

Seth Magaziner is a father, husband, and proud Democrat. He’s running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Seth will protect Social Security and Medicare and work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate with drug companies. He will defend a woman’s right to choose, stand up to the gun lobby to pass common sense gun safety measures, and make Rhode Island a leader in the clean energy economy - creating good jobs while combating the climate crisis. Seth is running for Congress in the competitive open Second District. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue?

name: Cecile Richards
subject: The loss of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

The Supreme Court just overturned Roe v. Wade and stripped 36 million
women of the freedom to make their own decisions about their own bodies,
health care, and future. Now it’s up to all of us to immediately fight
back.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220626-1.kozp_f&refcode=ema20220626-195427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=195427%2E444211%2EUH7nvS ]If you’re in this fight with Beto and me, will you donate now to help
defeat Greg Abbott and elect a governor in Texas who will guarantee the
right to choose?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220626-1.kozp_f&refcode=ema20220626-195427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=195427%2E444211%2EUH7nvS ]Fight Back: Donate Now

For the past half-century, this was the promise to women in the United
States:

We had the right to decide when and whether to become mothers.

We could finish school, move up in a career, and have a family when we
were ready — a right that women have around the world.

We could follow our dreams wherever they led us. And we had the freedom to
make our own decisions about our own bodies, our own health care, and our
own futures.

But six justices on the Supreme Court have taken this all away. With one
decision, the government and politicians will make the most personal
decisions about our bodies and pregnancies.

This generation will be the first one in 50 years that has lost the right
to determine their own futures.

I’ll be honest: My
generation wasn’t cynical enough to fully comprehend the extent of the
Republican Party’s willingness to trade away people’s lives for political
power and control — with Greg Abbott at the forefront. He not only fought
for but signed a law that bans abortion outright without any exception for
rape or incest. He did that, and it will go into effect in a matter of
weeks.

But it is important to know that this fight does not end once abortion is
criminalized. Republican politicians are already threatening to outlaw
forms of birth control, like IUDs. They will continue to attack us until
we win political power.

As a mom, I’m angry that my kids and others of this next generation will
live in a world filled with this fear, a world in which they do not have
the right to control their own body.

It is on all of us to stand up and fight back because there IS something
we can do right now.

Gaining political power is the only way to meet this challenge — and if
the Supreme Court is going to leave it up to the states to decide who has
control over a woman’s body, then we MUST elect a governor in Texas who
believes in a woman’s right to choose. There’s no other option.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220626-1.kozp_f&refcode=ema20220626-195427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=195427%2E444211%2EUH7nvS ]Please, as a proud
part of Beto’s campaign for governor, I’m asking you to donate anything
you can to help us defeat Greg Abbott. Texas needs us to win.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220626-1.kozp_f&refcode=ema20220626-195427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=195427%2E444211%2EUH7nvS ]Contribute $3

It will take unprecedented political activism to restore what is
rightfully ours: the ability to make our own decisions about our bodies.

I am in this fight. Beto is in this fight. I hope you are in this fight,
too. It will not be easy, but it is a fight we can and must win.

Let’s get to work,

Cecile

Cecile Richards
National Finance Chair, Beto for Texas
Former President of Planned Parenthood

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=195427%2E444211%2EUH7nvS

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: JoshRileyForCongress.com
subject: checking supporter records before our biggest fundraising deadline ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Peter,
It’s Emily, Josh Riley’s Finance Director. I wanted to personally check in with you because we have our single-biggest fundraising deadline to-date coming up Thursday at midnight.

Here’s why it’s a big deal: every three months we are required by the FEC to publicly disclose our fundraising numbers. It’s a testament to the strength of our campaign’s grassroots support, especially because Josh refuses to take a cent of corporate PAC money.

Here’s why THIS report is an even bigger deal: The June end-of-quarter report will be the first public report since new district lines came out, and the first report that will be directly compared against Marcus Molinaro’s fundraising report.

That’s why we are making a big push to finish the quarter strong. We need to raise $15,000 before midnight Thursday, and I just pulled your supporter record before this big deadline strikes. Can we count on your first $5 contribution to get us started towards this goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-jrfc-22q2-em?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220626-1-EM

This report is our ONLY end-of-quarter deadline before our primary, so we need a strong showing. There is a lot on the line this election, and Republican special interest groups are laser-focused on defeating Josh and turning NY-19 red.
We can’t let that happen.

Especially with the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade and more state legislatures passing bills further restricting reproductive rights. It’s never been more critical for Democrats to have the House majority so we can finally codify Roe v. Wade into law and protect the rights of millions of Americans.

So please, Peter, if it’s within your budget will you contribute your first $5, $10, or more today and help us have a strong showing for the end-of-quarter deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-jrfc-22q2-em?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220626-1-EM

Thank you in advance for your action,

Emily Goldson
Finance Director
Josh Riley for Congress

**If you’ve donated by check or online, thank you for your support! Our online records aren’t perfect — if your donation isn't reflected above, it may be attached to a different email address, or it simply has not been entered into our system yet.

Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
Josh Riley for Congress
PO Box 6806
213 Tioga St
Ithaca, NY 14851
United States
https://www.facebook.com/JoshRileyNY/ [https://www.facebook.com/JoshRileyNY/] https://twitter.com/joshuaue99 [https://twitter.com/joshuaue99]
CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-jrfc-22q2-em?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220626-1-EM]
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-jrfc-22q2-em?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220626-1-EM&amount=5&recurring=true]
If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851.

**It’s what drives me to fight like hell to address the gun violence epidemic, so our children don’t live in fear of showing up to school.**

It’s no surprise that he blames the gun violence epidemic on _everything_ but dangerous assault weapons.

So while my opponent runs to the bank with his next NRA check, I’ll be working day and night to keep working families, our schools, and our communities safe from gun violence.

name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: Wouldn’t this be worth $3?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
wouldn’t expanding the majority be worth $3?
#

What would you do if you knew $3 could flip North Carolina and send Cheri Beasley to the Senate — virtually guaranteeing we expand our Democratic majority?
What if you knew your $3 is what it took to defeat Ted Budd and his super PAC allies who are spending $33 million on TV ads alone to buy North Carolina’s open seat to install another MAGA Republican in the Senate, wouldn’t you chip in immediately?
If you knew $3 meant we ended the filibuster and codified nationwide protections for abortion rights, LGBTQ equality, voting rights, and every other freedom that the extreme far-right is working to roll back right now, wouldn’t that be worth it?
That’s the opportunity we have today. But Cheri Beasley is counting on a large number of donations to make sure we have the resources to win in November. What do you say? Isn’t all of this worth $3?
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to stand with Cheri Beasley before our FEC deadline in 4 days? This is a critical moment for all of us, and the stakes of this race are simply too high for us to come up short.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220626-1-ma&t=1&akid=1120%2E357359%2Et4xCCL)

name: Matt Putorti
subject: Pride is both a celebration and a protest 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
We are also organizing because we know we must fight to protect our rights

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013548/352693781/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220626-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc1ZDU5OC04OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rvHe6u1gOP2sD_Kl2S6H6JqFq_zDHGJTahEYTvDW2F8=)

| This month, I’ve had the privilege of attending Pride events across the district. In rural Upstate New York, queer people of all ages and our allies are gathering to celebrate and form community.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013549/352693782/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220626-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc1ZDU5OC04OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rvHe6u1gOP2sD_Kl2S6H6JqFq_zDHGJTahEYTvDW2F8=)
We are also organizing because we know we must fight to protect our rights. Since radicalizing from purported moderate to MAGA leader, Elise Stefanik has escalated her assault on the LGBTQ+ community. She voted against the Equality Act and even dropped her support of the so-called “Fairness For All Act.”

_**As a member of the LGBTQ+ community, I take Stefanik’s actions personally.**_

Her party is working to dismantle constitutionally protected rights and all but erase LGBTQ+ people from American society:
* Clarence Thomas made it clear that Friday’s Supreme Court decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ should open the door to also overturn the right to same-sex marriage.

* “Don’t Say Gay Bills” are being proposed and passed across the country.

* The Republican Texas Attorney General issued a legal opinion that stated that providing gender-affirming health care to trans children is child abuse.

What Stefanik and the extreme faction of the Republican Party are doing is dangerous, un-American, and contradictory to what the majority of Americans want.

I’ve devoted many volunteer and pro bono legal hours to advancing LGBTQ+ equality with organizations like TLDEF, Lambda Legal, and the Stonewall Community Foundation. One of the reasons I am running for Congress is to continue that work.

**Pride is both a celebration and a protest. Let us celebrate the gifts of this community and be organized to fight for our freedom and equality.**

Matt Putorti
| | Matt Putorti is a gay attorney and the Democrat who will beat Elise Stefanik. [_**Please keep up his campaign’s momentum by chipping in before the FEC deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013550/352693783/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220626-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc1ZDU5OC04OWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rvHe6u1gOP2sD_Kl2S6H6JqFq_zDHGJTahEYTvDW2F8=)
---

clean_body: We are also organizing because we know we must fight to protect our rights | = | This month, I’ve had the privilege of attending Pride events across the district. In rural Upstate New York, queer people of all ages and our allies are gathering to celebrate and form community. = We are also organizing because we know we must fight to protect our rights. Since radicalizing from purported moderate to MAGA leader, Elise Stefanik has escalated her assault on the LGBTQ+ community. She voted against the Equality Act and even dropped her support of the so-called “Fairness For All Act.” As a member of the LGBTQ+ community, I take Stefanik’s actions personally. Her party is working to dismantle constitutionally protected rights and all but erase LGBTQ+ people from American society: Clarence Thomas made it clear that Friday’s Supreme Court decision overturning Roe v. Wade should open the door to also overturn the right to same-sex marriage. “Don’t Say Gay Bills” are being proposed and passed across the country. The Republican Texas Attorney General issued a legal opinion that stated that providing gender-affirming health care to trans children is child abuse. What Stefanik and the extreme faction of the Republican Party are doing is dangerous, un-American, and contradictory to what the majority of Americans want. I’ve devoted many volunteer and pro bono legal hours to advancing LGBTQ+ equality with organizations like TLDEF, Lambda Legal, and the Stonewall Community Foundation. One of the reasons I am running for Congress is to continue that work. Pride is both a celebration and a protest. Let us celebrate the gifts of this community and be organized to fight for our freedom and equality. Matt Putorti | | Matt Putorti is a gay attorney and the Democrat who will beat Elise Stefanik. = | = | | = Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress Matt Putorti for Congress PO Box 45 Whitehall, NY 12887 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Elise Stefanik, please

body:
Folks,
Kyla wrote yesterday about just how important the outcome of the 2022 election is for the Secretary of State office. We needed to make sure you saw it because the future of our country very well depends on how we show up in November.
Democracy is in danger and our hard-won rights are at stake. Everything depends on voting rights, and far-right extremists are working to silence us.
Jena is your champion for ballot-box access, but she cannot do this alone. We need your support in order to defeat Big Lie candidate Tina Peters. Join the fight now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-jg-eoq?refcode=220626-email]
Solidarity,
Team Griswold
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-jg-eoq?refcode=220626-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-jg-eoq?refcode=220626-email]
Peter,
I have to be straightforward, there is so much on the line in this election. The campaign is working hard to reach as many people as possible so that we can convey to voters that the issue we are facing as a country hinge on voting rights and fair elections.
The right to abortion, gun control, economic fairness, union rights, and so much more depends on the ability to hold free and fair elections across the country. The first step toward losing every right we hold sacred is the erosion of the will of the people.
Jena is running for re-election to make sure that YOUR voice is always heard. We need your help ahead of our end-of-month deadline. Please chip in whatever you can to help keep democracy intact! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-jg-eoq?refcode=220626-email]

Money is pouring in to Colorado to try and roll back our progress. . We are not going to let that happen. Join our team immediately and help democracy survive in Colorado >>> rush in $22 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-jg-eoq?refcode=220626-email&amount=22]
Thank you so much for all you do!
Kyla Sabado
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!

clean_body: Andy Kim has spent his entire career leeching off the taxpayer| | | | | Friend, Andy Kim is a far-left career politician by definition. He’s spent his whole career on the taxpayer’s dime. In Congress, he’s a RUBBER STAMP for Biden’s radical agenda and a RELIABLE Pelosi puppet. But he’s vulnerable in November, and we have a real chance to win this. Taking back Congress for American families and workers starts with DEFEATING Andy Kim. | | I’ve spent my career as a job creator and a man of service, and I couldn’t be any more different than the politicians in DC. When I’m elected, they won’t have any idea what to do with me. My top priorities in Congress are Pro-America, Pro-Parent, and Pro-Jobs. I’ll fight for energy independence in Washington I’ll be a voice for parents across the country I’ll bring my job-creating experience to the table in Congress I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work for everyday Americans in Congress, even if that means being a total outsider in DC. After winning our primary, we’ve built some strong momentum. But friend, my campaign doesn’t have time to celebrate. It’s time to look towards the general and do everything we can to DEFEAT far-left radical Andy Kim in the #1 battleground race in America. | | We need a Congress in Washington that will work for the PEOPLE, not Joe Biden and the DNC.** | | | | Thanks,Bob Healey | | | | | | Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress | | P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’ve been doing some reflecting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=422%2E5257348%2EFZbjad ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Hey Derek,

After a truly grueling couple months, this weekend I’ve been doing some
reflecting.

I’m thinking about how our work holding to account those responsible for
the attack on democracy last year has made one thing incredibly clear: Our
system was strong enough to hold — but there is no guarantee it will hold
again, if we don’t stop the spread of the Big Lie that almost destroyed
it.

We can’t afford to let Trump’s cronies gain any more power. The danger
they have put our democracy in — not to mention what they are doing to
roll back voting rights, abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights — has proven that
they will do anything to control our country and tee up an illegitimate
Trump presidency should he run and lose in 2024.

I’ve also been thinking about the state of the midterm elections. The
reality is, historically, voter turnout is usually low during a midterm
year. In addition to that, the party in power typically loses seats —
seats we can’t afford to lose with a 4-seat House Majority and 50-50
Senate. And now, it’s clear we need to add at least two pro-choice
Democrats in the Senate to abolish the filibuster, and codify Roe into
law.

This is why I’m not taking anything for granted, and why it’s so important
that we band together before Thursday’s FEC deadline so that we can
protect our House Majority and expand our Democratic coalition.

So I’m humbly asking:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20220626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=422%2E5257348%2EFZbjad ]Can you pitch in $10 before our quarterly FEC deadline to help us
prepare for our most crucial election season yet?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=jun2022_abs_em.RKBqOK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20220626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=422%2E5257348%2EFZbjad ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2022_abs_em.rfaCVT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20220626_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=422%2E5257348%2EFZbjad ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

What we’re up against may seem overwhelming, but with a grassroots effort
like ours, we will win and keep pushing for progress.

— Adam

name: Stop GOP Gerrymandering
subject: This is a long email.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
But you don’t have to read the whole thing.
|
---

---
| _A note from the NDRC team..._

We want to acknowledge that the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ is hitting many people hard. This decision will cause tremendous harm. The NDRC is committed to working for a future in which all human rights are protected.

If you would like to support abortion access directly, you can make a donation to more than 80 abortion funds at [_this link._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47014266/352698205/-1348740862?refcode=20220625.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmYTUyYzkzLThhZjUtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9pBAQppWvmvFonxQ6QWcG2UIXj7QUuG-dwtJKxo75-s=)
---
Folks – When it comes to why we need to _stay in the fight_ for fair maps, A.G. Holder said it best:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47014267/352698206/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220625.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmYTUyYzkzLThhZjUtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9pBAQppWvmvFonxQ6QWcG2UIXj7QUuG-dwtJKxo75-s=)
---
Here's just some of what we can do with the help of grassroots supporters like you:
**1\. Build On State-of-the-Art Mapping Capabilities**
---
In several states where litigation is pending – including North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, and others – it’s possible that some new maps will need to be drawn before the 2024 elections. So to get ready, we’re investing in new technologies, data, and mapping innovations.
[PITCH IN TO HELP US KEEP IT UP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47014268/352698207/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220625.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmYTUyYzkzLThhZjUtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9pBAQppWvmvFonxQ6QWcG2UIXj7QUuG-dwtJKxo75-s=)
**2\. Improve Redistricting Reforms**
In 2018 and 2020, we helped pass redistricting reforms that were instrumental in securing fair maps in states like Colorado and Michigan. Moving forward, we plan to build on these successes to help achieve bold redistricting reforms in even more states.
[PITCH IN TO SUPPORT OUR WORK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47014270/352698208/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220625.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmYTUyYzkzLThhZjUtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9pBAQppWvmvFonxQ6QWcG2UIXj7QUuG-dwtJKxo75-s=)
**3\. Target Elections Key to Redistricting**
Plus, all over the country, the GOP is ramping up their efforts to target races across the country, including state court elections in an effort to elect judges they believe will rubber stamp gerrymandered maps. That means we need to prepare for the long term by electing pro-democracy leaders.

The good news is our work in 2018 and 2020 made a big difference for Democrats running for state-level offices. In states like Pennsylvania, Kansas, and Wisconsin, Democratic governors ended up vetoing manipulated maps. And this year, we’re targeting races in 17 states that will have a big impact on the future of redistricting.
[PITCH IN TO HELP US](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47014271/352698209/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220625.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmYTUyYzkzLThhZjUtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9pBAQppWvmvFonxQ6QWcG2UIXj7QUuG-dwtJKxo75-s=)
Yes, it's a lot of work. Which is why grassroots support from people like you is so important! **Folks, if you want to strengthen American democracy, now and in the future, will you chip in to the NDRC today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

clean_body: But you don’t have to read the whole thing. | | A note from the NDRC team... We want to acknowledge that the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade is hitting many people hard. This decision will cause tremendous harm. The NDRC is committed to working for a future in which all human rights are protected. If you would like to support abortion access directly, you can make a donation to more than 80 abortion funds at = Folks – When it comes to why we need to stay in the fight for fair maps, A.G. Holder said it best: = Here's just some of what we can do with the help of grassroots supporters like you: 1\. Build On State-of-the-Art Mapping Capabilities In several states where litigation is pending – including North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, and others – it’s possible that some new maps will need to be drawn before the 2024 elections. So to get ready, we’re investing in new technologies, data, and mapping innovations. = 2\. Improve Redistricting Reforms In 2018 and 2020, we helped pass redistricting reforms that were instrumental in securing fair maps in states like Colorado and Michigan. Moving forward, we plan to build on these successes to help achieve bold redistricting reforms in even more states. = 3\. Target Elections Key to Redistricting Plus, all over the country, the GOP is ramping up their efforts to target races across the country, including state court elections in an effort to elect judges they believe will rubber stamp gerrymandered maps. That means we need to prepare for the long term by electing pro-democracy leaders. The good news is our work in 2018 and 2020 made a big difference for Democrats running for state-level offices. In states like Pennsylvania, Kansas, and Wisconsin, Democratic governors ended up vetoing manipulated maps. And this year, we’re targeting races in 17 states that will have a big impact on the future of redistricting. = Yes, it's a lot of work. Which is why grassroots support from people like you is so important! Folks, if you want to strengthen American democracy, now and in the future, will you chip in to the NDRC today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: Reminder: Roe v. Wade is Dead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D
body:
It's back to the state!
| | | |
---
|
---
|
Roe v.Wade is Dead
---
|
With the Supreme Court's decision on Dobbs v. Jackson, the Supreme Court overturned 50 years of Federal abortion rights.
Millions of unborn babies have been given the gift of life!
Justice Alito, in his opinion, says that:
---
---
Federal abortion rights were never constitutional.
Now that Roe v. Wade has been overturned, each state gets to decide whether to allow the heinous act of ending the life of a precious, vulnerable human being.
I want you to know that I am unequivocally pro-life.
Science and data prove that a new life, a new body, and a new strain of DNA begins at conception.
Everyone is endowed with life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, including the unborn.
The fight is just beginning. Now, it is time to work on making Michigan a pro-life state.
As governor, I will work with the legislature and pro-life Michiganians to implement life-affirming policies, so that women do not see abortion as their only recourse.
I will fight until we remove this scourge of abortion from the State of Michigan.
Will it be easy? No.
Pro-aborts will come after you for your pro-life beliefs. They will riot, censor, dox and otherwise threaten you.
They will rage against the dying of this evil, but they have already lost, and they know it.
We may lose some battles, but in the end, we will win the war.
God bless the unborn and God bless the brave Justices of the Supreme Court!

###
---

---
To liberty!

Ryan D. Kelley Candidate for Michigan Governor

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: re: 1-point race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
I need your help taking the LEAD at our final quarterly deadline.
| **\--- OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS MEMO: REBECCA FOR GOVERNOR ---**
---
Friend,
---
I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but this is a make-or-break moment for our campaign, and I refuse to be left wondering on Election Day what more we could’ve done.
---
So, here’s where we stand:
---
**
* A brand-new poll just dropped showing we’re 1 POINT behind our weak opponent who’s loved by the cronies in the Madison swamp
* The 6/30 end-of-quarter deadline is our _FINAL_ quarterly deadline before Election Day – and we still need to raise another $18,195 to hit our goal
**

---
But I’m not reaching out just to give you bad news, Friend.
---
With the last major deadline of the primary only days away, we have the chance right now to _take the lead_ in this neck-and-neck race.
---

With the last major deadline of the primary only days away, we have the chance right now to take the lead in this neck-and-neck race. And to help us get there, generous Wisconsin conservatives are MATCHING all contributions before the deadline. It’s no secret: the Madison swamp who’ve loved having radical liberal Tony Evers in office are throwing their support behind our primary opponent. Why, you ask? Because they know I’m the ONLY candidate who can and WILL fire Tony Evers. In fact, I’m the only one who is polling within the margin of error of beating Evers in November. You have my word Friend, as a TRUE conservative, I will dismantle Madison and return power to the people of Wisconsin. And I’m the only candidate who will stay true to that promise. body:
As you may know, my 2016 Senate race was one of the closest in the country
| | |
---
Hi there,
I know you're probably getting a lot of emails right now, but I hope you'll let me explain why your support matters so much, especially right now.
The Supreme Court's radical decision to take away a woman's freedom – her right to bodily autonomy – has pulled us back decades. But it doesn't end there. If Republicans take back the Senate majority, they will work to ban abortion nationwide.
[**Before I go any further, will you rush a donation to protect this seat and our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47014855/352701257/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk621-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjAxMDc3Ny04ZmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CZA76-D0AvQG1tiM2hHCReHMbUoy-RJfQ1rADNRAURQ=)
As you may know, my 2016 Senate race was one of the closest in the country. Once the dust settled, I won by a margin of just 1,017 votes – unseating a Republican incumbent in the most expensive Senate race New Hampshire had ever seen.
If each and every person who helped by donating, knocking doors, or calling voters hadn’t done what they did for our campaign, we would have lost.
**Now, six years later, I'm up for reelection in a race that will likely be even more expensive and just as close. **
Outside interest groups have already spent over $9 million attacking me, and CNN labeled New Hampshire as one of the most likely seats to flip.
Our most important FEC deadline yet is in four days, but our fundraising has significantly slowed. Once our numbers go public, Republicans will comb every line of our report looking for any vulnerabilities.
Knowing what the margins were in my last race, it's clear that we can't win – and protect Democrats' Senate majority – without you, our grassroots supporters. **That's why my team is setting a goal of $75,000 before we close the books on Thursday. **
**[Can you chip in $3 or any amount today? Jevin has a proven track record of fighting for Arizona families and is ready to keep fighting in Congress. Growing up, he saw firsthand what the people of Arizona go through. That’s why he won’t tolerate inaction from Republicans in Congress. Jevin will be a champion for healthcare, public education, and voting rights and is committed to advocating for the needs of everyday Arizonans.

On the other hand, Jevin’s opponent, David Schweikert, is MAGA-lovin’, Big Lie-spoutin’, election-denyin’ Congressman who, in his spare time, has been cited by the House Ethics Committee for multiple ethical violations. Schweikert’s margin of victory has shrunk in recent years, but Republicans are still pouring money into the race to defend his seat.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Abortion rights in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
Due to the Supreme Court’s decision, each and every state will decide whether the women who reside there can have an abortion.

With _Roe v. Wade_ overturned, Pennsylvania’s race for governor becomes one of the most important in the country when it comes to abortion access for large numbers of women. Please read the email below from Josh Shapiro, Democratic nominee in that race, and [**chip in whatever you can to help him win. This is important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-shapiro-only?refcode=em-220626-1-30&refcode2=869_4767699_sDg32f&akid=869%2E4767699%2EsDg32f) \- Team Newsom
* * *
Friends -
It’s official: _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned by the U.S. Supreme Court.
It’s been a hard few weeks since this decision was leaked, but now it’s _real_ — and I’m sure you’re angry, frustrated, and scared about what this means. I am too.
**But this decision means the next Governor will have the ability to sign — or veto — that legislation. I will veto _any bill_ that restricts a woman’s right to choose — and with this news, we know that’s going to be one of the most consequential decisions our next Governor makes.**
[**We must win this race to keep abortion safe, legal, and accessible in Pennsylvania. It is literally up to us. Can you donate whatever feels right to you in this moment to help defend reproductive rights in Pennsylvania?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-shapiro-only?refcode=em-220626-1-30&refcode2=869_4767699_sDg32f&akid=869%2E4767699%2EsDg32f)**
You probably know a grandparent, aunt, parent, sibling, or even yourself who marched for the right to choose fifty years ago, before _Roe v. Wade_ became the law of the land.
I’ve met people who marched back then — people who are furious and tired that they have to do this all over again for something they thought was set in stone — a right that we all thought would be protected forever.
**I want you to know that I’m furious too. That I will not ever back down from protecting the right to choose in Pennsylvania — from protecting women’s lives.**
Due to the Supreme Court’s decision, each and every state will decide whether the women who reside there can have an abortion.
**So with a Republican Legislature that’s tried time and time again to restrict abortion access (even through a constitutional amendment), we can be certain they’ll send a bill severely limiting abortion access in Pennsylvania to the desk of the next Governor.**
[**Know this: abortion remains legal in Pennsylvania — and will remain legal if I’m elected Governor. Can you donate $3 or whatever you can today to elect a pro-choice Governor in Pennsylvania?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-shapiro-only?refcode=em-220626-1-30&refcode2=869_4767699_sDg32f&akid=869%2E4767699%2EsDg32f)
These past few weeks have been tough — but I know that we have the voice, the strength, and the determination to keep abortion access legal in Pennsylvania.
Together, we can do this.
Josh Shapiro

PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=869%2E4767699%2EsDg32f).

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Post-Roe America: my thoughts after taking a breath
disclaimer_text: Paid for BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congress[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/ElissaSlotkin_bigLogo.png]
Friend,
As I had a moment to get back to Michigan and think about the SCOTUS decision, I’ve tried to pull out of the pure politics of the moment and hone in on what makes me so angry about the decision.
Certainly, it’s connected to the fact that Michigan is poised to snap back to a 1931 law, based on an 1846 ban, which bans nearly all abortions, including in cases of rape and incest. But it’s more than that: It’s the hundreds of conversations I’ve had over the past month with women — and the way a straight ban on abortions ignores the very women it so deeply effects.
Since the decision leaked in May, women with all kinds of views have raised this point with me. Some talk about being raped, having never told anyone at the time. Some didn’t have the resources to have and care for a child. Others had ectopic pregnancies, or desperately wanted a child but had a miscarriage that was getting dangerous to their health. There’s all sorts of reasons a woman may not be able to have a child. And yesterday’s decision takes a broad brush, limits women’s choices, and wipes options off the table.
But where I have learned the most over the past month has been the stories of the self-described pro-life women who have opened up to me on this issue. They have approached me quietly, on the margins of events, to explain their views. Most have cited their faith as the reason they would not personally terminate a pregnancy. They speak passionately about their spiritual views on this issue. But in the same breath they will say clearly that, as women, they also felt that they could never tell another woman how to make her life choices, because they had not walked in her shoes. They had strong personal and religious views, but did not believe they had the right to tell other women how to live. They understood the role of personal freedom in this issue.
That sentiment is precisely the standard Roe had preserved. It allowed for the freedom for women to make choices in the millions of scenarios that can happen in life. And it’s why it’s so hard to understand the minority of people who don’t believe in any exceptions, for any reason.
I am running against someone who brags about that being his position, and uses it to fundraise for his campaign.
To believe in no exceptions is to not understand the trauma of a violent rape, or the twisted crime of incest, or to ignore the imminent death of a woman who may desperately want a child but would leave her family without a mother altogether unless she terminated a dangerous pregnancy. Each of us knows someone who has had to make these intensely personal choices, and those are the people who this decision leaves in the cold.
Worse still, members of the Michigan legislature are so missing the human element of this issue that they have even proposed strengthening the criminal charges against women and doctors who receive and provide abortion. My opponent is a self-described leader in this effort. To me, this is a transparent effort to play up the base politics of this issue – rather than remembering there are human beings with real lives in this story.
Lastly, I feel deep frustration about the failure of planning and imagination by the Washington leaders and advocates that has allowed us to get to this point. While the anti-abortion community has been pushing for nearly 50 years, we did not come with a similar, strategic plan. But we are where we are.
We are now in post-Roe America, and after a day to respond, it’s time to get to work. In Michigan, we have two legal challenges and a petition drive to repeal the 1931 law on our ballot. At the federal level, we need to do whatever is necessary to codify the Roe standard into law. I am looking at a bipartisan bill that Senators Collins and Murkowski have brought forward to that end, and I will continue to push my party’s leadership to be pragmatic and results-oriented in this moment.
Thank you for reading,
Elissa

name: Kina Collins
subject: Rep Danny Davis thinks he is going to lose

clean_body: And he is desperately calling in every favor to save himself | | | Dear Friends, Leadership is when you put your community first. Period. This morning we found out that Rep. Danny Davis has the power to ask President Joe Biden to stop his work, abandon his efforts to protect the Democratic majority, put down his pen before signing any executive action on gun violence prevention, and endorse a 25-year incumbent running in a deep blue district with no Republican challenger. This is the final proof. Rep Danny Davis cares about only one thing. Saving himself. Davis first. IL-07 second. This election has taught us that Rep Davis has the power to activate virtually every member of Democratic leadership, including the President of The United States. So how has he used that power to help our communities over the last decade? Where was the help after every mass shooting on the West Side? Where was the help when our schools were getting shut down and hospitals stopped giving out vaccines? Where was the help to end the largest life expectancy gap in the nation? I am ashamed to be represented by a Congressman who puts his own personal needs above the needs of the people in our district What is power without action? It is nothing. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

There’s a lot at stake in the upcoming election, and now that the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , our rights are on the line.

**Abortion rights are on the ballot.** The Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , meaning Michigan now reverts to a 1931 statute criminalizing abortion. That’s why I filed a lawsuit and used my executive authority to urge the Michigan Supreme Court to immediately affirm the right to abortion.

**But my opponents aren’t backing down. They’re spending millions of dollars to attack me and they’ll throw everything they have at me to win.**

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Thank you for fighting with us
body:
Thank You for Fighting with US Last week, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus delivered a petition with over 1000 signatures to Senators Wicker and Hyde-Smith asking them to vote against the gun contro | |
---

| | | Thank You for Fighting with US |
---|---|---
| Last week, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus delivered a petition with over 1000 signatures to Senators Wicker and Hyde-Smith asking them to vote against the gun control bill. Thank you for taking a stand for our constitution and fighting for our rights and freedom.We are happy to report that both Sen. Wicker and Sen. Hyde-Smith voted against the bill, but unfortunately, 15 republican senators voted for gun control and the bill passed.We may have lost this battle, but the war is not over. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus pledges to continue fighting for our freedom and liberty both in Jackson and in Washington D.C. To keep up with what is happening, keep your contact information updated so we can contact you when it's time to take ACTION.[Click Here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/DHk00EoOOxUIpYvR3q7hgA) |
|
* * *
| The Caucus is a political organization dedicated to promoting the ideals of individual rights, limited government and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi.
| Mississippi Freedom Caucus
530 George Street, Suite 200
Jackson, MS 39202
www.FreedomCaucus.ms
662-469-6242
info@freedomcaucus.ms
---|---

name: From the Desk of Laurel Imer
subject: T- 2 days to the Primary Election!
body:
Get Out and Vote! Every vote counts!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ZHXWYTxT_6sIZQlgHc0zctTPpqd5iMQQLsMLgIO__5-c3LNFmQbwC0R5rkhDnXKJZsZnqEaPfhw8a8_YlZBg-B1NbdMoro9KzM4MuhrgZ6B1CfL6tLJBdZ6_UA4KQSQt2SL8frNQk-UaYETlAfcinqDoYYaFhY5GfYJJj-vC8DjQleFFBnjd3Ox5Z_t9OsNaUMIqsJfyiShxbOsMLpsb0_l0ypWa_ax6U0Yi-zhKX4xbtgTtF4Ydw==&c=CquWhPTYivNNnyizHPp6xGUl-P2vCARq1LTTLw7Pp0Shc8-EBHmPJg==&ch=u8k-k7-ytXB5fhAEiAUb2D06bkxNFTjy68rnlrW2IfahfDxUEPa4Ng==)
---
| |
---
| Friend,
Election Day is around the corner so make sure you get out and vote! Your vote could make all the difference in this primary and we need your support.
If you have not yet returned your ballot I encourage you to drop it at an indoor drop box on the day of the election or the day prior. I also encourage you to vote in person on Monday and Tuesday. Voting in person and not mailing your ballot back are two very important ways to ensure election integrity.
Last but not least, I request that you research your candidates, follow the money, and have all the facts before voting. Uneducated voters have led to the disastrous leadership we are currently under. Make sure that you are educated on your choice before it is too late to change your vote or mind.
I ask that you to watch the video below to learn more about one of my Republican Primary Opponents. It is important to have all the facts before making a decision on whom you want to vote for and I implore you to follow the money and see for yourself where your candidates have come from.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ZHXWYTxT_6sIZQlgHc0zctTPpqd5iMQQLsMLgIO__5-c3LNFmQbwOWt-pIOcSElu-r2R8eX2Z-X2w0ZnAJWJiahJWPbwhDsIUD3oLf0Tuxc5KyV8l3FtfaRFcn81iS-Tvyamn-MU6sOi_-9mdjkdA==&c=CquWhPTYivNNnyizHPp6xGUl-P2vCARq1LTTLw7Pp0Shc8-EBHmPJg==&ch=u8k-k7-ytXB5fhAEiAUb2D06bkxNFTjy68rnlrW2IfahfDxUEPa4Ng==)

Onward to victory! | Sincerely, | Laurel Imer Republican Congressional Candidate, CO-07 == | | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Laurel Imer for Congress and approval by Laurel Imer | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

name: Team Patty
subject: We won’t let them win, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We can’t lose one of the strongest voices for reproductive rights in the Senate.
#
Peter,

There is no question that the Supreme Court's ruling allowing extreme politicians to insert their agenda into a patient's most personal decisions was a dark day for reproductive health care.

The far-right ideologues who have worked for this moment for decades would love nothing more than for us to hang our heads in despair and give up the fight. **_But we won't let them win._**

**[Patty Murray is leading the fight to build a strong, pro-choice majority in the Senate and continue fighting for every American’s ability to make their own health care decisions. name: Nan Whaley
subject: I need your help to protect abortion access in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
Ohio Republicans are currently considering a total ban on abortion – and the governor’s election this fall could determine whether it becomes law.

Folks,

The last few days have been dominated by the Supreme Court’s overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ and the devastating impacts that decision is likely to have on our country, including here in Ohio.

**[Ohio Republicans are currently considering a total ban on abortion – and the governor’s election this fall could determine whether it becomes law. Contribute $5 right now to keep abortion legal in Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016228/352706553/-320037227?refcode=nw_em_220626_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZlNDRhMi05YWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkXs4UUjYTTdvqIcUvmBpxSVQYYIjs2yC4MirUNZfos=)**

Republicans in the Ohio legislature are already colluding with Governor DeWine to restrict access to abortion in Ohio and criminalize care. But they’ve admitted that they may not be able to pass their anti-choice legislation before this year’s elections.

If we defeat DeWine and his anti-choice allies, we have the chance to stop them from pushing this legislation through and ensure that Ohio remains a pro-choice state.

---
**Peter, political experts are sounding the alarm: Across the country, extremists are gaining ground in the polls.**
Since securing the Senate majority in 2020, we've been able to make real, meaningful progress for American families.**But all of our wins will be on the chopping block if we let partisanship win on Election Day!**
**Trudy Busch Valentine, a former nurse, is running for Senate to put people first, to put an end to partisan games, and to bring compassion back to Washington.** She knows that Americans have had it with corporate greed, political gridlock, and extremism. In the Senate, she'll lead with honesty, integrity, and kindness.
We need Trudy's voice in the Senate, but she's up against powerful forces. It'll take a strong, united grassroots movement to win in Missouri and send a nurse's heart to Washington. **As we head into one of the most important election cycles in modern history, Trudy needs to know if you have her back. So please, before our poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, will you respond to tell us:**
**Do we need more compassion in Washington?**

clean_body: Across the country, dangerous extremists are gaining ground in the polls. | | | Peter, political experts are sounding the alarm: Across the country, extremists are gaining ground in the polls. Since securing the Senate majority in 2020, we've been able to make real, meaningful progress for American families.But all of our wins will be on the chopping block if we let partisanship win on Election Day! Trudy Busch Valentine, a former nurse, is running for Senate to put people first, to put an end to partisan games, and to bring compassion back to Washington. She knows that Americans have had it with corporate greed, political gridlock, and extremism. In the Senate, she'll lead with honesty, integrity, and kindness. We need Trudy's voice in the Senate, but she's up against powerful forces. It'll take a strong, united grassroots movement to win in Missouri and send a nurse's heart to Washington. As we head into one of the most important election cycles in modern history, Trudy needs to know if you have her back. So please, before our poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, will you respond to tell us: Do we need more compassion in Washington? | | | | Survey link created for dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
| Hi,

This is a long email – but it’s really important, so I hope you take the time to read it.

Now that our first TV ad of the election is live, we’re facing a major Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline in less than a week. I know we have been reaching out a lot lately, so I wanted to take a moment to explain why this deadline is so important before asking you to chip in to our campaign:

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/fec-deadline-june](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016588/352708551/781711077?amount=15&contactdata=bbi%2F9Mi4K5JzxYhKBR7v0X6HQ7ghnZAQp9hDpy7U350IkgRpbRB49kyhDaYqG%2BvzNInm%2FHNNULfBWcPNtWPDXxfIaIdkVjwPA8nf7I3G2MCsIvtkHc5L2ea9tkicz6tLoeEqx5DqMBMQwB8Yr%2FgS%2BQ%3D%3D&refcode2=cf99316f-9df5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5MzE2Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAylBtUfozK8YvPRapsz8S4fR5391pJ911aQGz_uOYk=)**

This is our first public filing since our opponents reserved $2+ million in negative attack ads against us. Every day we see what’s at stake in this election – **including just this past week when the conservative justices on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v Wade.**

On June 30th, we have to publicly report our fundraising numbers. So it’s crucial that _we shatter our previous fundraising records and prove our people-powered movement has the resources we need to fight back._

**I’m going to level with you. Right now, we’re behind where we need to be and we still need to raise at least another $25,000 before Thursday at midnight.**

**[All eyes are on us. Because of redistricting, our race is one of the most competitive in the entire country. Will you chip in now to help our campaign put up record-breaking fundraising numbers at this important moment?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016589/352708552/781711077?amount=15&contactdata=bbi%2F9Mi4K5JzxYhKBR7v0X6HQ7ghnZAQp9hDpy7U350IkgRpbRB49kyhDaYqG%2BvzNInm%2FHNNULfBWcPNtWPDXxfIaIdkVjwPA8nf7I3G2MCsIvtkHc5L2ea9tkicz6tLoeEqx5DqMBMQwB8Yr%2FgS%2BQ%3D%3D&refcode2=cf99316f-9df5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5MzE2Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAylBtUfozK8YvPRapsz8S4fR5391pJ911aQGz_uOYk=)**

This quarterly report is what our opponents will use to decide where to invest in the last five months of the campaign. And if we show any sign of weakness, even more dark money will be spent in the district — _on top of the millions of dollars already announced._

**It’s up to us to prove we can win despite those hurdles — and show our opponents and their dark money groups that mid-Michigan is NOT for sale. That’s what this FEC fundraising deadline is all about.**

**[Every dollar is important to powering our summer of all-out campaigning—including our brand new TV ad—and enabling us to stand up to the extremist dark money groups that want to buy this race. Chip in $15 or whatever you can right now to push us closer to our goal:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016590/352708553/781711077?amount=15&contactdata=bbi%2F9Mi4K5JzxYhKBR7v0X6HQ7ghnZAQp9hDpy7U350IkgRpbRB49kyhDaYqG%2BvzNInm%2FHNNULfBWcPNtWPDXxfIaIdkVjwPA8nf7I3G2MCsIvtkHc5L2ea9tkicz6tLoeEqx5DqMBMQwB8Yr%2FgS%2BQ%3D%3D&refcode2=cf99316f-9df5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5MzE2Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAylBtUfozK8YvPRapsz8S4fR5391pJ911aQGz_uOYk=)** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016591/352708554/781711077?amount=15&contactdata=bbi%2F9Mi4K5JzxYhKBR7v0X6HQ7ghnZAQp9hDpy7U350IkgRpbRB49kyhDaYqG%2BvzNInm%2FHNNULfBWcPNtWPDXxfIaIdkVjwPA8nf7I3G2MCsIvtkHc5L2ea9tkicz6tLoeEqx5DqMBMQwB8Yr%2FgS%2BQ%3D%3D&refcode2=cf99316f-9df5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5MzE2Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAylBtUfozK8YvPRapsz8S4fR5391pJ911aQGz_uOYk=)**
My campaign is working hard to connect with every last voter. But that on-the-ground organizing work takes time, hustle, and resources — and I can’t do it without you.

**[I’m all in, and I’m asking you to join me. Chip in $15 right now to tell our opponents mid-Michigan is not for sale.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016592/352708555/781711077?amount=15&contactdata=bbi%2F9Mi4K5JzxYhKBR7v0X6HQ7ghnZAQp9hDpy7U350IkgRpbRB49kyhDaYqG%2BvzNInm%2FHNNULfBWcPNtWPDXxfIaIdkVjwPA8nf7I3G2MCsIvtkHc5L2ea9tkicz6tLoeEqx5DqMBMQwB8Yr%2FgS%2BQ%3D%3D&refcode2=cf99316f-9df5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220626_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5MzE2Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAylBtUfozK8YvPRapsz8S4fR5391pJ911aQGz_uOYk=)**

Thank you so much for your continued support,
Dan

As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. | | Peter, With the Supreme Court reversing the decades-long precedent of Roe v. Wade and preparing to overturn more landmark decisions, we need to stand up and make our voices heard. In November, we have the opportunity to elect Wade – someone who recognizes it is past time for Congress to take action and pass legislation that protects a woman’s right to reproductive freedom and privacy. The First District is the most flippable District in Georgia this year – but it’s going to take time, energy, and money to fuel our road to victory in November. We are preparing to expand our field program, hire more canvassers, and build on our progress from the runoff. Meeting voters at their door is one of the most effective ways to grow support from the ground up, and we need a strong paid canvassing operation to make that happen. **Wade is ready to be the leader our District deserves, but first we need to get him elected!**[**Can you chip in $20 today to help kickstart our field program?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016633/352708712/215785241?refcode=whem0626&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDRiZDExZC05ZWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UhoIOKoN3KEiFgx0xBPFtbK9vQPuO3TQCbUMGVXRKBo=)

clean_body: | | | = | | Peter, With the Supreme Court reversing the decades-long precedent of Roe v. Wade and preparing to overturn more landmark decisions, we need to stand up and make our voices heard. In November, we have the opportunity to elect Wade – someone who recognizes it is past time for Congress to take action and pass legislation that protects a woman’s right to reproductive freedom and privacy. The First District is the most flippable District in Georgia this year – but it’s going to take time, energy, and money to fuel our road to victory in November. We are preparing to expand our field program, hire more canvassers, and build on our progress from the runoff. Meeting voters at their door is one of the most effective ways to grow support from the ground up, and we need a strong paid canvassing operation to make that happen. Wade is ready to be the leader our District deserves, but first we need to get him elected!= = This election is bigger than just you and us. It is a decision about America’s future. And we need to make sure everyone knows! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47011757/352686257/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGI3NzVlMi03Y2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eaIxQBPw06T0_EJ3xB-k103Gb4LeMOjdnJ0PyTavfTA=&emci=e2c68c2d-d7f3-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=18b775e2-7cf5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, Time and time again, the vast majority of Americans tell us they believe abortion is health care. But on Friday, six unelected Justices decided to take that right away, in service to the extremist agenda of the GOP. This catastrophic decision will set women and all childbearing people back five decades to a time when they were treated like second-class citizens. Stripping away the right to choose exacerbates cycles of poverty and racism and leaves marginalized people unprotected—especially in states like Missouri.**So long as our pregnancies are governable by the state, there can be no freedom for anyone seeking control over their own body and life. ** While I feel devastated and violated by this decision, there is no time to mourn— _only to fight back_. If the extremists can take away our bodily autonomy, everything from contraception to LGBTQ+ rights could be on the table. I’m calling upon Congress to urgently codify abortion rights and calling upon every concerned citizen to organize, march, and vote in support of that effort. **Any elected leader who lacks the courage to defend our bodies and medical privacy from government overreach has got to go. ** The right to choose is a fundamental personal freedom. I will do everything I can—both here in Missouri and in Congress—to reinstate and protect that right. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through Any elected leader who lacks the courage to defend our bodies and medical privacy from government overreach has got to go. The right to choose is a fundamental personal freedom.
