name: Charles Booker
subject: Can I call you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

We’ve had enough,
Peter.

For too long, Rand Paul has consistently ignored Kentuckians — he doesn’t
care that millions can no longer access abortion care, how long someone
has been out of a job, whether our children are safe at schools, or
whether families can afford rent next week. But now, we have a historic
chance to turn the tides of our future.

I am confident that we can win this race against Rand Paul. But in order
to do that, we have to raise enough to compete with Rand’s big money
donors. That’s why we’re setting our most ambitious goal yet.

Over 50,000 people have already stepped up to contribute to this campaign.
The people chipping in $5, $15, $25 at a time are making this race
possible, and I couldn’t be more grateful.

To show my gratitude, I’m calling some of our online donors to say thank
you. I’ll call as many of the people who click now and donate as I can to
express my gratitude. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220626.TzMiPv&refcode=em20220626-2130&t=1001&akid=2130%2E346206%2EuZqyUJ ]Can you chip in whatever amount you can afford
right now to help us meet our fundraising goal? You might receive a call
from me to say thank you.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220626.TzMiPv&refcode=em20220626-2130&t=1020&akid=2130%2E346206%2EuZqyUJ ]Contribute $5

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220626.TzMiPv&refcode=em20220626-2130&t=1021&akid=2130%2E346206%2EuZqyUJ ]Donate to get a call from Charles

Thousands of Kentuckians from the hood to the holler are rising up with us
to defeat Rand Paul, elect change and send a working class champion to the
U.S. Senate. Our campaign is gaining momentum, but we need your support to
make sure we post big numbers for our crucial end of quarter deadline.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220626.TzMiPv&refcode=em20220626-2130&t=1022&akid=2130%2E346206%2EuZqyUJ ]Peter,
help us reach our goal by donating
whatever you can between now and June 30. After you donate, keep your
ringer on. I might be the one calling from that unknown number to say
thanks!

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220626-2130-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2130_346206_uZqyUJ&akid=2130%2E346206%2EuZqyUJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

Peter,

**I am running for Congress because our fundamental rights are under attack,** and because our only chance at securing them is preventing radical Republicans like my opponent from gaining power.
[Our campaign’s most important deadline yet, the final end-of-quarter deadline before our primary election, is in just three days. Wisconsinites know that Van Orden’s plans to outlaw abortion in all cases, including rape, incest, and when a woman’s life is at risk, are dangerous and wrong. **When voters learn of Van Orden’s opposition to reproductive rights, I gain 9 points on him - bringing this race to a _dead tie_.**

Peter, we won’t be able to hold the House and protect reproductive rights if we allow the GOP to flip blue seats. **Any Democratic House majority _must_ include WI-03.

[I’m ready to get to work in Congress standing up for the rights we hold dear. My insurrectionist opponent, Derrick Van Orden, would aid the GOP’s goal of enacting a nationwide abortion ban. Wisconsinites know that Van Orden’s plans to outlaw abortion in all cases, including rape, incest, and when a woman’s life is at risk, are dangerous and wrong. When voters learn of Van Orden’s opposition to reproductive rights, I gain 9 points on him - bringing this race to a dead tie. Peter, we won’t be able to hold the House and protect reproductive rights if we allow the GOP to flip blue seats. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Abortion rights in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I will veto any bill that restricts a woman’s right to choose.

|
---
| Peter, it’s official: _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned by the U.S. Supreme Court.

It’s been a hard few weeks since this decision was leaked, but now it’s _real_ — and I’m sure you’re angry, frustrated, and scared about what this means. I am too.

**But this decision means the next Governor will have the ability to sign — or veto — that legislation. Peter, I will veto _any bill_ that restricts a woman’s right to choose — and with this news, we know that’s going to be one of the most consequential decisions our next Governor makes.**

[_**Peter, we must win this race to keep abortion safe, legal, and accessible in Pennsylvania. It is literally up to us. Can you donate whatever feels right to you in this moment to help defend reproductive rights in Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016841/352709427/815265081?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220626-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzU4NDc4Ni05ZmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ld3MvQ2guf43Zsx03sY-4y-Ee9jJASql0_Ho-MHzxTo=)

You probably know a grandparent, aunt, parent, sibling, or even yourself who marched for the right to choose fifty years ago, before _Roe v. Wade_ became the law of the land.

I’ve met people who marched back then — people who are furious and tired that they have to do this all over again for something they thought was set in stone — a right that we all thought would be protected forever.

**I want you to know that I’m furious too. That I will not ever back down from protecting the right to choose in Pennsylvania — from protecting women’s lives.**

Due to the Supreme Court’s decision, each and every state will decide whether the women who reside there can have an abortion.

**So with a Republican Legislature that’s tried time and time again to restrict abortion access (even through a constitutional amendment), we can be certain they’ll send a bill severely limiting abortion access in Pennsylvania to the desk of the next Governor.**

[_**Know this: abortion remains legal in Pennsylvania — and will remain legal if I’m elected Governor. Can you donate $25 or whatever you can today to elect a pro-choice Governor in Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016842/352709428/815265081?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220626-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzU4NDc4Ni05ZmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ld3MvQ2guf43Zsx03sY-4y-Ee9jJASql0_Ho-MHzxTo=)

These past few weeks have been tough — but I know that we have the voice, the strength, and the determination to keep abortion access legal in Pennsylvania.

Together, we can do this.

Josh Shapiro

I am angry, friend [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47017038/352710260/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220626_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFjNGE3Yy1hMWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2tB1XVRYTCcfT_Y1lWz6sfIx8K39BEHJSgU-5H2I-0=&emci=a537a48b-98f4-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4eac4a7c-a1f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

I'm angry, friend – but sadly, I'm not surprised: **The U.S. Supreme Court just upended nearly half a century of precedent by overturning _Roe v. Wade_.** The votes of five hard-line conservatives just eviscerated reproductive freedom for at least 32 million women across the country. To all of you out there who are shocked, angry, scared – please know that I feel your pain. I hear your anxiety. And that is why I say: **This fight is not over. We will NOT go back.** We will not go back to a time when women were treated as second-class citizens. We will not go back to a time when personal health care decisions were made for us by politicians like Marco Rubio. We will not go back to a time when women died because they didn't have the basic human right of deciding when to start their own family. Friend, the right-wing justices on the Supreme Court just did what GOP politicians like Marco Rubio have been pushing for for decades. **Now, we can only safeguard reproductive freedom if we expand our Democratic majority and codify the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ into law.** **[So today I'm asking you to turn your anger into action. Guarantee an expanded Democratic majority by donating to help me defeat Marco Rubio here in Florida. Whatever you can donate at this urgent moment will ensure our grassroots campaign has the resources to send a pro-choice woman to the Senate and show extremist Marco Rubio the door. Please split a donation between Martin Heinrich and me now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47017039/352710261/-888276747?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220626_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFjNGE3Yy1hMWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2tB1XVRYTCcfT_Y1lWz6sfIx8K39BEHJSgU-5H2I-0=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Val Demings and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47017040/352710262/-888276747?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220626_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFjNGE3Yy1hMWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2tB1XVRYTCcfT_Y1lWz6sfIx8K39BEHJSgU-5H2I-0=)

We have witnessed years and years of coordinated Republican-led assaults on reproductive freedom that culminated in today's decision by the Supreme Court. It's a sad, dark day for our country. I am determined to not go back – but I need you and your determination alongside me. Let's flip this seat blue, expand our majority and codify _Roe_ into law.
Thank you so much,
Val Demings

clean_body: I am angry, friend I'm angry, friend – but sadly, I'm not surprised: The U.S. Supreme Court just upended nearly half a century of precedent by overturning Roe v. Wade. The votes of five hard-line conservatives just eviscerated reproductive freedom for at least 32 million women across the country. To all of you out there who are shocked, angry, scared – please know that I feel your pain. I hear your anxiety. And that is why I say: This fight is not over. We will NOT go back. We will not go back to a time when women were treated as second-class citizens. We will not go back to a time when personal health care decisions were made for us by politicians like Marco Rubio. We will not go back to a time when women died because they didn't have the basic human right of deciding when to start their own family. Friend, the right-wing justices on the Supreme Court just did what GOP politicians like Marco Rubio have been pushing for for decades. Now, we can only safeguard reproductive freedom if we expand our Democratic majority and codify the protections of Roe v. Wade into law. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Val Demings and Martin Heinrich: | | = = | = = | = = We have witnessed years and years of coordinated Republican-led assaults on reproductive freedom that culminated in today's decision by the Supreme Court. It's a sad, dark day for our country. I am determined to not go back – but I need you and your determination alongside me. Let's flip this seat blue, expand our majority and codify Roe into law. Thank you so much, Val Demings | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Hello,
Well, that didn’t take long. **Less than an hour after I was declared the Democratic nominee for Senate in Iowa, the attacks from Chuck Grassley began.**
_“The most liberal nominee in Iowa Senate history”
“Radical”
“Socialist”_
Gotta love it!
Chuck Grassley doesn’t know what to say about me. He’s never faced an opponent like me before. I’m his political nightmare, so he’s just throwing cow pies at the wall and hoping something sticks.
Calling me “radical” is laughable when Chuck Grassley supports a complete ban on abortion and letting literally anyone buy an AR-15 without even a background check. **But there’s one attack that I absolutely won’t take lying down, and that’s Chuck Grassley’s attacking me for serving our country for 36 years in the U.S. Navy.**
Grassley is already trying to say that because I enlisted in the military at age 19, because my deployments meant that my family had to move from state-to-state and country-to-country... that I’m not an Iowan anymore.
Chuck Grassley wants to pretend that I wasn’t raised in rural, northwest Iowa. He ignores the enormous sacrifices that my family – my wife and my kids – made to allow me to serve in the Navy.
**Grassley’s attacks denigrate every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, spend holidays away from each other, and be absent from life’s big events like weddings and the birth of a child.**
**And if Chuck Grassley thinks that I will stand silent while he says that every Iowan who puts on our country’s uniform stops being an Iowan... he’s delusional.**
These are the kinds of attacks I’m going to be up against. Nasty stuff from Chuck Grassley, Mitch McConnell, and the Fox ‘Entertainment’ News propaganda network.
There’s one reason why: The GOP is scared. They’ve seen the polls, and they know that if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.
**In order to fight back, we need to raise $850,000 before our federally-mandated FEC deadline at midnight on June 30th, but the only way we’ll hit our goal and send Grassley packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**Please, can I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47017218/352711047/-42398318?refcode=em20220626pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzYwNDY3MC1hM2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_mSz6Ayk7cDpWqROApZ4gVFcOjhMF0nW4OPYI7zRjw=)

In order to fight back, we need to raise $850,000 before our federally-mandated FEC deadline at midnight on June 30th, but the only way we’ll hit our goal and send Grassley packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = These attacks against me are ridiculous, but we cannot let them go unanswered. Thank you for being a crucial part of this phase of our campaign, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

| | [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=6b82bc9de8&e=64ac72257a)

| |
# Dear Peter,

Yesterday I was endorsed by [The Baltimore Sun](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=b58f8a64e3&e=64ac72257a) in the Maryland Republican Primary. This comes on the heels of the [Washington Post’](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=8825ffb4e6&e=64ac72257a)s endorsement of my campaign just a few weeks ago.

---
| [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=53eda02388&e=64ac72257a)
---
| As the Sun put it, "the choice is obvious."

My experience as a legislator and two-time cabinet secretary of the state's two largest economic agencies make me uniquely qualified to face any Democrat in November.

Every candidate running in the Democratic primary will take Maryland in a completely different direction than the past eight years. They want to take us backward and we cannot afford to let that happen.

Maryland will continue to move forward on my watch and I am asking for your help today.

We have only three weeks until the Primary and I need to continue to run my ads statewide and focus on get out the vote efforts.

[**Can you help by chipping in these final weeks of the Primary?**](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=e395a3dbb9&e=64ac72257a)

Thank you,
---
|
---
| **Kelly Schulz**
Candidate for Governor

Peter,

Newsweek released an article this week about recent polling that shows the Senate race in Georgia is currently tied at 46% each.

The article goes on to say:

_"...if [Raphael] Warnock does lose to [Herschel] Walker, that GOP victory may shift the balance of power in the Senate. With the legislative chamber evenly split, Democrats losing just one seat without simultaneously picking up another one held by a Republican would be enough for the GOP to take back the majority."_
-Newsweek 6/19
This is what we've been saying for months: the future prosperity of our nation rests on the outcome of this race.

We need your help, or we will be facing another two years of Democrat control in Washington. _**[If Democrat-controlled Washington is something you want to avoid, then I'd really love to see your name on our list of donors before midnight tonight.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a03822c2c87f45de9df09343ad24aab3&_e=3rZbXRTGcEqCP6qz4UB0R4eMkahKSiWHLIGJOmjA_XoN2OmUgnyoxZtM_2lTnIed6CX5PWv8xM7kAZ-t0VnWXMR4S6dIUHOqAebhn06e6JSJ1Q4bUGI6-y6RHVx4v-W_rlZwczGa_PS5nd6GmjDLbGTvhsJ_1TEXRHgf9WU26c5SzLeJxAgPBSrr4d9581T5Z0JSs62wDoy5lZ-FXVynMRYTjYmw-b_tzsm_GMuQoqdER75tt10nnikPQDqD6zf0rhOeOQsP7Xs2yxzVqeQum3NHJu4Nb8STgoLYKKqmOqpBiDu3pey-oTzE7tySUMcEi0V82o9h2MSY6_s3Ppwo6cqxWKaSNW7HDICBSTvx_c76iS7_Rd6C_5nEjGv4GnvVhY8gB0jgPJexI7UVvrS3fa37-9kpXQ40AAPhuojg9wpgUtFLwayylxERKVbezr84b0xa24P0HN_svD5JNwzZye3LiXAWRbdB1gnJmKZNklgS3nCNqNyDyxUCbH1uA38B)** _

In just 135 days, we're going to find out who the voters want representing them in Washington. I can tell you this today, though: for every day that we don't hit our fundraising goal, our ability to pull off a victory in November becomes harder and harder.

clean_body: Don’t let this happen again, Peter. We will win, but we need your support! | Peter, Newsweek released an article this week about recent polling that shows the Senate race in Georgia is currently tied at 46% each. The article goes on to say: "...if [Raphael] Warnock does lose to [Herschel] Walker, that GOP victory may shift the balance of power in the Senate. With the legislative chamber evenly split, Democrats losing just one seat without simultaneously picking up another one held by a Republican would be enough for the GOP to take back the majority." -Newsweek 6/19 This is what we've been saying for months: the future prosperity of our nation rests on the outcome of this race. We need your help, or we will be facing another two years of Democrat control in Washington. A lot of folks believe we've already got this race locked up or that we'll automatically win as part of a Red Wave that sweeps the country in November. That couldn't be any further from the truth.The fact is that this tied race is up for grabs. That's why Senator Warnock and Senator Chuck Schumer are running more than $60+ million in ads to defend this seat that they think they own. In just 135 days, we're going to find out who the voters want representing them in Washington. I can tell you this today, though: for every day that we don't hit our fundraising goal, our ability to pull off a victory in November becomes harder and harder. If you want a Republican majority, Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: They’re indoctrinating our troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
During my service in the Navy and my time at the Naval Academy, the only thing that mattered for my brothers and sisters in arms was the American flag| | | [](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f84668e0565e45a68278527b7d02501f&_e=maYk_asN8wNIQYBhfz7_YL3Wc04TZIh1sB16QA7n0Oecih9Hh0smG5W3pAwqkGhERtn9JTlJ8041_rWK99nekqcRPma4ka0OGqPdyUInAfXroSxYO2fvrf8eplSf5E6c4oLchlqXqWVX7RHAVAJR6_7q1svikxamK1sODhaIEJoRc8RNTDJK97Lw92F_zwXAz0QR_hP4u-UJCBv4Antul1ZrCTod-_1WGtY_pfDhcR_4gXcPmg0x1T8-sPuOc1OlKwPTahO7y-ixUbCjYZ0_lz8MGZ1gsAO1HBoiuOZsqKIqJ0oA4hpqh2k0sPnzDRVhi6FONBevNrfg2YU4d2bCrVL3QYkzKhIQdrQhcO0P4djAj9P183GhlO-RWikKO92KniIhXe3lzNgmzbNrJr3LBzQbA084ikI26r5ArwvPew0%3D)
---
Peter, During my service in the Navy and my time at the Naval Academy, the only thing that mattered for my brothers and sisters in arms was the American flag on our uniforms.

But now, they’re teaching Army cadets critical race theory at West Point.

They’re even telling students that “white people and people of color live racially different structured lives.”

This is dividing and harming our troops, and is the last thing students should be learning at our military academies.

**I’m taking a stand against CRT in our military academies, and I need your help.**

[**Will you sign our “Stop CRT” petition now and demand the END of critical race theory at our military academies?**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f84668e0565e45a68278527b7d02501f&_e=maYk_asN8wNIQYBhfz7_YL3Wc04TZIh1sB16QA7n0Oecih9Hh0smG5W3pAwqkGhERtn9JTlJ8041_rWK99nekqcRPma4ka0OGqPdyUInAfXroSxYO2fvrf8eplSf5E6c4oLchlqXqWVX7RHAVAJR6_7q1svikxamK1sODhaIEJoRc8RNTDJK97Lw92F_zwXAz0QR_hP4u-UJCBv4AntulztvzEiXvfC4zZ2PxiO-QDBo3czjgcRQ1BU9oGxYF_pmhivR9kezYPgQLfMbezOil0d3vPdMF0WIUwHkyNBRaT-7MgR6cA1AWrOks-Xep_kEfq9OHPisBgWLnUZBmaAVtB6FNL1y2CNCl2Ueu67-kYvDnxxuwTYzpq_kZOdqcpS-Cst1HPeJaBxn8xjRnw6xuK6DHNSrZbuXeIEEKXRfQl4%3D)

name: Valerie Biden Owens
subject: My brother Joe's representative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
LBR has proven herself to be an inspiring voice and a strong governing partner.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47017986/352713914/469547429?refcode=EM_FR_220626EOQ2_N_VBO_ACTIVES_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzRhMWVjZi1hNWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRO7HSeRF7ME1aWJ7xXXHXjvULup6A8xddGZ8Iuw6gc=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47017987/352713915/469547429?refcode=EM_FR_220626EOQ2_N_VBO_ACTIVES_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzRhMWVjZi1hNWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRO7HSeRF7ME1aWJ7xXXHXjvULup6A8xddGZ8Iuw6gc=) Hello, this is Valerie Biden Owens.

You might know me as the sister of President Biden. Having managed each of Joe's campaigns when he represented Delaware in the U.S. Senate, I know the importance of funding operations early. I also know that you can't get by in politics without strong, trusted allies.

Delaware's Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester (LBR) has been an incredible partner for Joe. She's been a key champion of his agenda to help working families and lower the cost of living. And she's the voice we need to keep in Washington.

name: John Fetterman
subject: The Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The right to an abortion is nonnegotiable.
#
**🚨 🚨 The Supreme Court struck down ****_Roe v. Wade._**** 🚨🚨**
Derek: Now that _Roe_ is overturned _,_ 26 states are certain or likely to ban abortion, _some starting today_. 36 MILLION women will lose power over their own bodies + lives.
It *didn’t* have to be like this.
We clearly can’t count on the Supreme Court and its three Trump-appointed justices to protect our rights.
But the Senate could have leaned in, scrapped the filibuster, and codified _Roe_ into law by now. The fact they haven’t is despicable.
We won’t let this stand.
**It’s NEVER been more important to STOP****Dr. Oz** , who called _Roe v. Wade_ “wrong” + supports an extreme ban on abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest, from getting anywhere near Pennsylvania’s open U.S. Senate seat.
[**_Derek, send me to Washington and I’ll be the 51st Democratic vote we need to abolish the filibuster + codify Roe into law. Please, rush a donation of any amount today to help us win this race, flip Pennsylvania, and protect the right to an abortion nationwide._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47696?refcode=em20220626-6310&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6310%2E434096%2E7K-nho)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47696?refcode=em20220626-6310&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=6310%2E434096%2E7K-nho)**
__
These are extraordinarily tough times, and I know it can be hard not to feel hopeless. Know that my heart + Gisele’s heart are with every single person affected by this.
**This is what I can promise:** We’re going to fight with everything we have, and we won’t stop until reproductive freedom is protected by law, in PA + across the nation.
Thank you.
John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220626-6310-footer&t=21&refcode2=6310_434096_7K-nho&akid=6310%2E434096%2E7K-nho)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=6310%2E434096%2E7K-nho)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=6310%2E434096%2E7K-nho)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Tom Perez
subject: WATCH our new ad: we won't go back
body:
As the father of two daughters, it’s heartbreaking to imagine that for the first time in their life they’re posed to have fewer reproductive rights than generations before them.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013311/352692511/-530921513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjMxNDY3MC04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnTwngZpzAoijRGSQub-qXBtkHDED2GUoEVcr1XView=&emci=a63a1fe2-81f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=b2314670-86f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837) Peter, The Supreme Court decision was a disgrace, and people will lose their lives because of this horrific decision. As the father of two daughters, it’s heartbreaking to imagine that for the first time in their life they’re posed to have fewer reproductive rights than generations before them. I refuse to let that stand. As governor, I will do everything in my power to further enshrine the spirit of Roe into our state Constitution, remove barriers to care, and make sure Maryland welcomes and protects all who come here seeking care. **[Will you watch our new ad focused on how Shannon and I will protect the right to abortion and ensure we never go back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013312/352692512/-2052922220?refcode=email_062622_daughtersad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjMxNDY3MC04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnTwngZpzAoijRGSQub-qXBtkHDED2GUoEVcr1XView=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47013313/352692513/-2052922220?refcode=email_062622_daughtersad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjMxNDY3MC04NmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnTwngZpzAoijRGSQub-qXBtkHDED2GUoEVcr1XView=) I’m proud to have spent decades defending the fundamental right to abortion. I had the honor to be among the first to implement and enforce the law to prosecute anti-abortion extremists when I served as a civil rights prosecutor. Years later, when I led the Civil Rights Division for President Obama, I made it a priority to step up our game and protect the right to access and provide reproductive health services without interference. I have worked closely throughout my career to give meaning to these rights. And that’s what I’ll continue to do as governor. Abortion and reproductive freedoms are fundamental freedoms—and they must always be. Because we won't go back. Tom Perez

---
| Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/AuhxpCAewE-gGfgmSslfcQ2?unsubscribedata=dEWcPqVcXSZekPiO%2B1K9nxJy3pPhmWj9xFoz3kH4I%2FGOQgrNct8zaTdtrdyMsdPgSpt3B%2Brz4xWVaf0EXhQIGRJijDGXZfHEDc6%2B2L4ZxJkjOBXdaqiI%2BdVzYNBWOcQUguOhJktOtc0i%2F6sriQAcJnI5S8%2BADpQYZA26JyJvm%2BdK%2Bwt927ApT8%2FUcZRwfvv6gHu0uRcksL%2FOQIiaJIk%2FC%2FOZChVP6Uf6aVffLdWK4KLB46%2FiP43sI45WiEiMuHo2JZSvVw9Y%2Fq4f4OKno06UI40X1wb7YvNi3IBAA%2Fcl4Q6vMWQr7wDEFhbmS%2FMta%2FCzAFnCElUOlELE%2FIVj%2Ft4L%2BHJCOAx%2FeoPVoRAHkwC1Q7ZDCiRJ0PKgVoXnCY7rWyxAcBcHgDHg%2BzTWPtLiY2qufByCCbIpiXPxBWoxvUaMFDA4szdxZCFTHh0NSyVbaC6o)**.

body:
I’m so damn angry I can hardly type this message to you
| | |

I’m so damn angry I can hardly type this message to you, friend: the Supreme Court just officially overturned Roe v. Wade.
I ain’t gonna lie to you: The Senate is now our LAST line of defense. **If Catherine Cortez Masto or Maggie Hassan lose, MAGA extremists will retake the Senate and you can kiss the RIGHT TO PRIVACY good-bye! They could punish women in every corner of this country** — **from coast to coast!**
In my expert opinion, Catherine and Maggie are the most vulnerable Democratic senators in the entire country. That’s why I’m so terrified about their races — Catherine's 3 points behind her extreme anti-choice opponent who’s celebrating this ruling as a “historic victory,” and Maggie is 2 points behind an anti-choice opponent.

clean_body: I’m so damn angry I can hardly type this message to you | | | I’m so damn angry I can hardly type this message to you, friend: the Supreme Court just officially overturned Roe v. Wade. I ain’t gonna lie to you: The Senate is now our LAST line of defense. If Catherine Cortez Masto or Maggie Hassan lose, MAGA extremists will retake the Senate and you can kiss the RIGHT TO PRIVACY good-bye! They could punish women in every corner of this country — from coast to coast! In my expert opinion, Catherine and Maggie are the most vulnerable Democratic senators in the entire country. That’s why I’m so terrified about their races — Catherine's 3 points behind her extreme anti-choice opponent who’s celebrating this ruling as a “historic victory,” and Maggie is 2 points behind an anti-choice opponent. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maggie Hassan and Catherine Cortez Masto immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up at this make-or-break moment for our country’s future. name: Abrams for Georgia
subject: Update on what Stacey has done since Friday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek —

Since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade on Friday, Stacey Abrams
has been out there making sure folks know exactly what the stakes are for
Georgians in this election.

She spoke with women in Georgia. She recorded a video for social media.
She raised money for organizations providing reproductive care. She
emailed you. She went on CNN, MSNBC and Fox News. All to share this
message:

Brian Kemp is an extremist who is a danger to the women of Georgia, the
LGBTQ+ community of Georgia and women of color in particular. He signed an
extreme 6-week abortion ban that will be in effect any day now, and he has
said he won’t stop there.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1481?refcode=sa_em_220626_B2_Roe_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=765%2E1862389%2EzplhLH ]Georgians cannot afford four more years under Kemp. Please, can you
make your first
donation to our campaign and ensure we elect Stacey Abrams as the next
Governor of Georgia?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1481?refcode=sa_em_220626_B2_Roe_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=765%2E1862389%2EzplhLH ]DONATE

Derek, the
threats to women — especially poor, Black, brown and rural women — and
LGBTQ+ people are not a theory.

The same day that that the Supreme Court struck down Roe, a notice was
filed in the 11th Circuit, which means Brian Kemp’s abortion ban will
become the law in Georgia, possibly as soon as next week.

These attacks do not have to be permanent,
Derek. If we elect Stacey
Abrams, she will defend the right to an abortion, stand up for women’s
reproductive rights and protect the rights of all Georgians.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1481?refcode=sa_em_220626_B2_Roe_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=765%2E1862389%2EzplhLH ]But we are up against a dangerous opponent who’s already shown he will
do anything he can to win. We need a massive grassroots team on our side
if we’re going to defeat him. Can you make your
first donation to
elect Stacey Abrams right now?

Thanks for all you do,

Abrams for Georgia

931 Monroe Dr NE

Peter,

Newsweek released an article this week about recent polling that shows the Senate race in Georgia is currently tied at 46% each.

The article goes on to say:

_"...if [Raphael] Warnock does lose to [Herschel] Walker, that GOP victory may shift the balance of power in the Senate. With the legislative chamber evenly split, Democrats losing just one seat without simultaneously picking up another one held by a Republican would be enough for the GOP to take back the majority."_
-Newsweek 6/19
This is what we've been saying for months: the future prosperity of our nation rests on the outcome of this race.

We need your help, or we will be facing another two years of Democrat control in Washington. _**[If Democrat-controlled Washington is something you want to avoid, then I'd really love to see your name on our list of donors before midnight tonight.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=42919f4f9aeb4a6cb5bf1cc2fdcd088d&_e=KnN786U8rww8cakOlN0-KBvhd3hrXNiOnajRkNzMUduV6jdDZDEyQz2hBa7T3FO4_QhRDrXGqFtZrsgtfSy3DNLBjK02PnZAByGLWB08WHl84-5-d-Hv2aul-B84ePM6dL0JLfI2BAgcywjS5H3lGQpLAVwA0XejWkjDQEA2SXNCYG1kUzXEINou9MHsPJADk10-n4YINAuYqM9RDRrhwCocQAXHcE9PO8VkGByobSv--nLVN6UaF1bj6b7sCprxyZA6B_RY1icU-OiwVwyytEhHccvovsoNJSp_bOAlDm4ARLSkPiX6sFhxlVlr2i80BkHHHjGVNmS0cArkIWfBypL1ugg5vzQJvLWFB97VwuUilUFiJv64LHcU7blWb1eiV5Cs716qip4ZpppD8xV0miNF6HKNc5B3uohqc6BDP3gNnNfEahvHMSpZMXbIfpTnt4JU7dSdZ-aYbFf31Z1JccERu_3fK6lT5J343xdbHPzcNu3GJ0ot1enCNSZsAyyG)** _

A lot of folks believe we've already got this race locked up or that we'll automatically win as part of a **_Red Wave_** that sweeps the country in November. **That couldn't be any further from the truth._The fact is that this tied race is up for grabs._** That's why Senator Warnock and Senator Chuck Schumer are running more than $60+ million in ads to defend this seat that they think they own.

In just 135 days, we're going to find out who the voters want representing them in Washington. I can tell you this today, though: for every day that we don't hit our fundraising goal, our ability to pull off a victory in November becomes harder and harder.

| Hi there,

It’s obvious that many voters assumed Nancy Mace would be a moderate alternative to Katie Arrington’s erratic politics, but Mace is _hardly_ a moderate. She is not trying to represent anyone but her own MAGA wannabe celebrity brand— _members of her own staff have said as much!_

**[Now, we have to prove that our team is ready to fight for this victory by reaching our crucial Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting goal in just a few days. Mace has done a lot of damage for someone who’s only been in Congress for less than 2 years:

**She voted _against_ the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, _against_ capping the price of insulin, _against_ emergency funding for the baby formula shortage, _against_ the gun safety bill that would help protect our children in schools — and more.**

Nancy Mace is not a reasonable or thoughtful candidate, and South Carolina deserves a leader who cares about our people and engages with our community.

As a pediatrician, day-in and day-out, I work to help the Lowcountry's kids at their toughest moments—after a gun incident, when they’re sick, and in more tough circumstances.

I’ve seen Lowcountry families at their lowest in the hospital and am running to prevent terrible moments like that in their lives. But I need your help right now to do it.

name: James Carville
subject: So angry I can hardly type
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |

I’m so angry I can hardly type this message to you, friend: The Supreme Court has officially overturned Roe v. Wade. It’s our worst nightmare coming true – the END of Roe v. Wade.
I ain’t gonna lie to you: The Senate is now our LAST line of defense. **If Catherine Cortez Masto loses in Nevada, MAGA extremists will retake the Senate and you can kiss the RIGHT TO PRIVACY good-bye! They could punish women in every corner of this country – from coast to coast!**
In my expert opinion, Catherine is the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the entire country. That’s why I’m so terrified about Catherine’s race — she’s 3 points behind her extreme opponent who wants to overturn Roe v. Wade. Furthermore, Mitch McConnell just unleashed another $15 MILLION in attack ads to crush her campaign.
[**Friend, ahead of her critical midnight deadline, I’m asking you to join me and split $5 in this make-or-break moment between Catherine and Kirsten Gillibrand. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: We cannot lose this seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

**The stakes of this election have never been higher.**
A woman’s right to make her own decisions about her body is fundamental to everything else. But that right is under attack across the country.
**Right now, the single most important thing we can do to protect access to abortion is to protect and expand our pro-choice Senate majority.**
[**Before I go any further, can you rush a donation to my reelection campaign and Cheri Beasley’s Senate campaign in North Carolina?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-mh-split.V0dJDh&refcode=em220626-1-ma&refcode2=1111.357359.8FfAcG&t=1&akid=1111%2E357359%2E8FfAcG)
Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the gavel, and he's laser-focused on New Hampshire. Extreme GOP groups have spent over $9 million attacking me, and a recent poll is showing me down by TWO points.
**Let me be clear: We cannot lose this seat.** Not now. Not with every single one of my opponents pushing an anti-choice agenda. And not with Mitch McConnell threatening a national abortion ban.
[**Will you please rush an urgent donation to keep this seat, flip North Carolina, and hold our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-mh-split.V0dJDh&refcode=em220626-1-ma&refcode2=1111.357359.8FfAcG&t=2&akid=1111%2E357359%2E8FfAcG)

body:
| | |

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | OFFICIAL DEMOCRATIC POLLING | | | | Over 20 states now allow for same-day voter registration, which means people can register to vote at the polls on Election Day. It is proven to boost voter turnout and strengthen our Democracy!! But the GOP has fueled their voting rights attacks and are spreading misinformation about same-day voter registration. FACT: Same-day voter registration boosts voter turnout by upwards of 7%. FACT: Millions of Americans think they are registered to vote but have actually been PURGED from voter rolls -- same-day registration fixes this problem! FACT: There is ZERO evidence that same-day voter registration increases voter fraud. | | | Your feedback is invaluable, \-- DrRaulRuiz.com | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. **The Washington Post says that defending our most fundamental rights will come down to electing Democratic governors, and I have to say I agree, friend. **Joe Biden may have won the presidency, but Arizona still has a Republican governor – one who's signed racist voter suppression bills and a radical 15-week abortion ban into law.
But here's the thing, experts from POLITICO to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirm we can win this race. But we're going to need to build a winning strategy to flip this battleground blue – and that's where you come in, friend.
**I asked my team to gather a list of top supporters for our official Summer Strategy Survey, and your name was on the list, friend. That means I need to have _your_ insights and know _your_ concerns if I’m going to shape an effective campaign strategy in the months ahead.**
**[It will only take a minute, but it would mean the world: Will you complete this 60-second survey so we can craft a strategy that will flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47014705/352700902/1906018842?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk859-su-nd&refcode=jtk859-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWQ1NzNjMi04ZWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mSA88y9J0PZ5P_7dLPlPp4AvXaZj-JoD9E3Cjghe3OE=&emci=c10c697f-7cf2-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=75d573c2-8ef5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)**

Thank you for standing alongside me in this movement.

– Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: There’s a better way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Any minute I don’t spend on my biggest priorities puts our ability to make real progress for the people at risk.
#
Peter, here's the ugly truth about campaign fundraising:
Members of Congress are often told that they should spend up to five hours EACH DAY on "call time" — time solely dedicated to calling up mega-donors and corporate PACs to get big checks and ensure re-election. _That's more than half of a regular workday!_
But as the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus and a leader in the fight for Medicare for All, climate resilience, humane immigration reform, and protecting and expanding our Democratic majorities in Congress — **any minute I don’t spend on those priorities puts our ability to make real progress for the people at risk.**
There’s a better way, and it starts with emails like this one. If one out of every four people reading this email chipped in $20.22, we could reach our FEC end-of-quarter goal of $55,000 in no time. [**Will you make a gift of $20.22 or $3 before the deadline at 11:59 pm on Thursday?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14423?refcode=em20220626-1355&t=1&akid=1355%2E420207%2Eiknz5n)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14423?refcode=em20220626-1355&t=20&akid=1355%2E420207%2Eiknz5n)**
At a time when corporations and CEOs are raking in record profits and working people are being squeezed from all sides by the rising costs of gas, groceries, housing, and utilities, we must fight harder than ever to loosen the grip that special interests and PACs have on Washington.
The best way we can begin to do that is by rejecting corporate money. **That’s why I don’t accept a dime in corporate PAC money.** By living our values and building a people-first movement that is invested in this work, we can build a Congress that actually fights for the people, not corporations.
But first, we’ve got to fight like hell to protect our Democratic majority and get more progressives like Delia Ramirez, Robert Garcia, Summer Lee, Andrea Salinas, and so many more of the candidates I’ve endorsed to Congress.
Are you with us? [**Chip in $3, $20.22, or any amount toward our end-of-quarter goal right now to sustain the movement we’ve built the right way:_with people power_.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14423?refcode=em20220626-1355&t=21&akid=1355%2E420207%2Eiknz5n)
Thanks for giving what you can at this critical time. Any amount makes a big difference.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220626-1355-footer&t=22&refcode2=1355_420207_iknz5n&akid=1355%2E420207%2Eiknz5n)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1355%2E420207%2Eiknz5n)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1355%2E420207%2Eiknz5n)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Ted Budd
subject: This is bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
We have to take the lead

|
---
Friends,

**I hate to say it, but this race is going to be really close.**

[**I need your help.**](http://links.buddfornc.com/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=32e3c1ef202e4915a9d8befba144a60c&_e=uY0scG5vnmoFFZ3X9HZ_HN6Q-Giq4MaWliFhp2jveEBJ1wh7i5t-KmbaUqAdF-KMNFZsAkGqVqpjsSIgWnxtflxlPHx36edDoQ_rdo6_8ZJXUNJLZOfKHcpNoyyeKTplJAiciNbadqWaOrFZuMNgBtiTR0SljTV9eXXvJqfdHs7CInIFZtjpcusQTE-pCm1XC9qvXB0_SptrjVZbIF7pdMFwZfzdspJeBgoXHpYN66Y4QzKkaThDCM7U_zjh684wX9cpsY9ZxnGMw5Xfvv_BBdsSBPRkBOhsJePCxchuWUJBmASAcckRvAT1BPu63aJdh14J1Uaa-rG0lSUg235rAkKUQEIkv__oB4CBpMZY5zDVgIPp1Rj_PEfp1rUHCFF20waf9sYTM2YqD49OigsZk33JqMNyN41hgd6Tm1o54qer6urNr2TiM22j0BLh1P7il2K6-rS43xjbJMrKajd2ZZsmPRe3AaWhcQa3_f5IJsj6ZFMFoGoxNoQrPpjZCjZu)

November will be here before we know it, and time is running out. We’re running against the AOC of North Carolina. clean_body: We have to take the lead | Friends, I hate to say it, but this race is going to be really close. November will be here before we know it, and time is running out. We’re running against the AOC of North Carolina. She’s been reaching out to her coastal liberal elite friends and the dark-money Biden supporters to help her campaign - and she is keeping it close, despite a disastrous Biden record. New polling shows she MIGHT beat us. Now more than ever, I need your help to ensure that we achieve victory this November. The North Carolina Senate race will be one of the top 5 most expensive races in the country, and it could be the most expensive race in the history of North Carolina. It’s our chance to start an America First wave across the country – but it starts with winning in North Carolina. Your support could make the difference between victory and defeat. | We can win this. In Liberty, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Sandra Dowling
subject: Welcome to Team Dowling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOWLING FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's time to bring Paul Gosar home. With your help, we can bring home our headline-seeking congressman by beating him in the August 2nd Republican primary.
| | |
---
| | Peter, Thank you for joining my team. I'm grateful to have your support. **I 'm excited to be running as a Republican in Arizona's new Ninth District to bring home our headline-seeking congressman, Paul Gosar.** The Representative for Western Arizona should be someone who fights for our farmers, veterans, service members, and parents - NOT someone who attends white supremacist events, encourages insurrection against our government, and who embarrasses our state on a weekly basis. But Peter I'll be honest, this is going to be a tough race. Paul Gosar is a long-time congressman and has strong support from the extreme right. But I accept the challenge. **Someone has to take him on and fight for decency and traditional conversative values.** Because of Paul Gosar's intense base of supporters, he gets donations every time he goes on TV spewing his conspiracy theories. I'm instead counting on everyday Arizonans like you to support my campaign. [**Please help me show that it 's time to retire Paul Gosar by making your first contribution of ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM tonight.**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-460124-49-0-3863-5207-0eb7a0752f-s7c45dfbe6) | | [**CONTRIBUTE $20**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-460124-49-0-3863-5208-0f0227b6c9-s7c45dfbe6)
---

| [**CONTRIBUTE $15**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-460124-49-0-3863-5209-580e8c73ef-s7c45dfbe6)
---

| [**CONTRIBUTE $10**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-460124-49-0-3863-5210-3b6abf9ca4-s7c45dfbe6)
---

| [**CONTRIBUTE $5**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-460124-49-0-3863-5211-641d9f18a9-s7c45dfbe6)
---

| [**CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-460124-49-0-3863-5207-0eb7a0752f-s7c45dfbe6)
---
There won't be a Democrat on the ballot in November, which means **_the Republican primary is our only opportunity to retire Paul Gosar in 2022._**
Election Day is approaching fast and I need your support urgently.
[**Please make your first contribution of ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM tonight to show that it 's time to retire Paul Gosar.**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-460124-49-0-3863-5207-0eb7a0752f-s7c45dfbe6)
Thank you,

Sandra Dowling
Candidate for Congress

subject: Nikki Budzinski needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019605/352743964/292184910?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM2MDdmZi1iN2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3SigPUI50ndOECFW1Z_Xz-SMFN8d_rN0UNr42UqE6k=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019606/352743965/161715760?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NBFC_20220626_EMDF_E1_T2_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM2MDdmZi1iN2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3SigPUI50ndOECFW1Z_Xz-SMFN8d_rN0UNr42UqE6k=) Friend, it’s Senator Dick Durbin from Illinois.

I’ll be frank: Working families in our country need a champion in the House.

With the prices for food, housing, gas, and the other essentials surging across the country, we need an advocate who will fight the corporate special interest Republicans who block the bills that benefit working families.

**Nikki Budzinski is the champion that working families need.**

She’s an Illinoisan, a labor activist, and she has spent her entire life fighting for working families. [**Look, Nikki needs your support to win this extremely competitive district. I'm proud to be supporting her campaign for Congress, and I hope that you'll join me. So please, will you chip in $3 to help elect Democrat Nikki Budzinski?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019607/352743966/161715760?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NBFC_20220626_EMDF_E1_T2_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM2MDdmZi1iN2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3SigPUI50ndOECFW1Z_Xz-SMFN8d_rN0UNr42UqE6k=) | [Chip in $3 to elect Democrat Nikki Budzinski »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019608/352743967/161715760?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NBFC_20220626_EMDF_E1_T2_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM2MDdmZi1iN2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3SigPUI50ndOECFW1Z_Xz-SMFN8d_rN0UNr42UqE6k=)
---
Listen, we’re working to make sure we don’t lose the House this year.

Republicans would cut vital reproductive health care, abandon working families, and undo all of President Biden’s hard work.

**But there’s hope.** By bringing people together, staying true to our word and our values, and turning out our voters, we can keep our majority.

We must send Nikki to Congress to build on her life’s work. She’ll fight for affordable college and job training, accessible child care, and an economic recovery that doesn’t leave working families behind.

_But she can’t do it without your support._
[**Nikki’s race will be one of the most competitive races in the country. If we can flip her seat, we can protect our House majority. So will you chip in $3?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019609/352743968/161715760?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NBFC_20220626_EMDF_E1_T2_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM2MDdmZi1iN2Y1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3SigPUI50ndOECFW1Z_Xz-SMFN8d_rN0UNr42UqE6k=)

Peter Willis,

Even being on the edge of losing abortion rights isn’t enough to stop Democratic leadership from selling out our values to the highest bidder.

Instead of supporting progressives who care about our communities, “moderates” like Nancy Pelosi and Jim Clyburn fight against us and work overtime to re-elect corrupt rightwing dinosaurs like Henry Cuellar – the LAST anti-abortion Democrat in the House and Trump’s “favorite Democrat.”

Bernie Sanders is telling a necessary truth: by betraying voters time and again and crushing energy in the base, Democrats are on track to forfeit power to a rising fascist movement in November and risk losing our democracy forever.

Our Revolution is running progressives against these corrupt corporate Democrats up and down the ballot. We need to win to make sure we have strong candidates and stave off a red wave that could be fatal for fair elections. name: Beto HQ
subject: The only way this changes is if we act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Just two days ago, the Supreme Court stripped women of the right to an
abortion. In Texas, Greg Abbott already has an automatic trigger law in
place that will now be able to outlaw abortion at any point with no
exception for rape or incest.

Our only option moving forward is to elect Beto as the next governor of
Texas. We have to get really serious about political power and what it’s
going to take to win this race.

We set a goal of raising $4,000,000 by the end of this month. It’s
ambitious but it matches the urgent moment we’re in right now. Every
single dollar we raise helps us reach more voters across all 254 counties
so we can win this race and protect reproductive freedom for Texas women.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220626-2.YwHNAF&refcode=ema20220626-195725&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=195725%2E444211%2EQhVfGa ]Please make
a donation of
$3 right now to help fight for abortion access in Texas by
electing Beto as governor.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220626-2.YwHNAF&refcode=ema20220626-195725&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=195725%2E444211%2EQhVfGa ]Contribute $3

Although this moment is extremely painful, we cannot give in to despair.
We must renew our commitment to protecting and fighting for women in Texas
to have control over their own bodies and health care decisions. Let’s
turn our anger into action and elect a governor in Texas who will fight
for us.

One of the best things you can do to help elect Beto is to make a
contribution right now and together, we can defeat anti-choice Abbott.
Will you make a contribution right now to help us reach our $4,000,000
goal before midnight on the 30th?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220626-2.YwHNAF&refcode=ema20220626-195725&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=195725%2E444211%2EQhVfGa ]→ Yes! I will contribute now to fight for reproductive freedom in the
state of Texas by helping to elect Beto as governor.

Thank you for all that you do,

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=195725%2E444211%2EQhVfGa

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Wade and uphold Mississippi’s pro-life law is a monumental win for the American people and millions of unborn lives. Today is a day of celebration for the pro-life movement. body:
Our country is facing a crisis moment for reproductive rights. On Friday, the Supreme Court struck down the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, and now the future of nationwide reproductive freedom comes down to Congress. It's never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office which is why I'm reaching out to you today to talk about my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016351/352707288/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE1ZTc1Mi05YmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9wyOeJnOjEwmlso7ciyqFdH17B4ZBhB2AkK0cgbsx8=&emci=fa39c237-e3f3-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ec15e752-9bf5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Our country is facing a crisis moment for reproductive rights. On Friday, the Supreme Court struck down the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision, and now the future of nationwide reproductive freedom comes down to Congress. **It's never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office which is why I'm reaching out to you today to talk about my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier.**

Kim will always fight back against any attacks on reproductive rights, but she's facing her toughest race yet and four anti-choice Republicans are running against her. She needs our help to ensure she wins her re-election this November and stays in Congress defending reproductive rights.

**[Will you join me in supporting Dr. Kim Schrier's re-election campaign? Chip in $5 or more before her FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016352/352707289/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220626_eoq3_fnd_gq_act___kg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220626_eoq3_fnd_gq_act___kg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE1ZTc1Mi05YmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9wyOeJnOjEwmlso7ciyqFdH17B4ZBhB2AkK0cgbsx8=)**

---

Peter – control of the House majority hinges on Washington's 8th District. With Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell saying a ban that would make abortion illegal nationwide is "possible," it's clear that reproductive rights are on the ballot this November.

As the only pro-choice, woman doctor in Congress, Kim knows that deeply personal decisions about when and whether to have a child should be between a patient and her doctor only. That's why last year, she helped pass the Women's Health Protection Act in the House to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing reproductive health care.

We can't afford to lose Kim's voice and perspective in Congress, but she has a tough fight ahead of her. Election experts are calling her race a "toss-up" and national Republicans are spending millions to attack her. She's counting on our support to help her defend her seat and the Democratic House majority.

**[Chip in to Kim's re-election campaign before her FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to help her continue to fight for reproductive rights in the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016358/352707295/-1401442231?refcode=em22_220626_eoq3_fnd_gq_act___kg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220626_eoq3_fnd_gq_act___kg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE1ZTc1Mi05YmY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9wyOeJnOjEwmlso7ciyqFdH17B4ZBhB2AkK0cgbsx8=)**

Thank you,

Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: Our country is facing a crisis moment for reproductive rights. On Friday, the Supreme Court struck down the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, and now the future of nationwide reproductive freedom comes down to Congress. It's never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office which is why I'm reaching out to you today to talk about my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier. Peter, Our country is facing a crisis moment for reproductive rights. On Friday, the Supreme Court struck down the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, and now the future of nationwide reproductive freedom comes down to Congress. It's never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office which is why I'm reaching out to you today to talk about my ally, Dr. Kim Schrier. Kim will always fight back against any attacks on reproductive rights, but she's facing her toughest race yet and four anti-choice Republicans are running against her. She needs our help to ensure she wins her re-election this November and stays in Congress defending reproductive rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Peter – control of the House majority hinges on Washington's 8th District. With Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell saying a ban that would make abortion illegal nationwide is "possible," it's clear that reproductive rights are on the ballot this November. As the only pro-choice, woman doctor in Congress, Kim knows that deeply personal decisions about when and whether to have a child should be between a patient and her doctor only. That's why last year, she helped pass the Women's Health Protection Act in the House to codify Roe v. Wade and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing reproductive health care. We can't afford to lose Kim's voice and perspective in Congress, but she has a tough fight ahead of her. Election experts are calling her race a "toss-up" and national Republicans are spending millions to attack her. She's counting on our support to help her defend her seat and the Democratic House majority. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand U.S. Senator To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

I hate to bother you on a Sunday...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016596/352708561/-1979597812?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.26_b1_sts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGQzMzg4Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nD6K5RSeXzyzjer0u2aST3rdHlCJMleMS-r7I_aPGew=)

Team, I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but I have something important I need to tell you.

This Thursday is the last day of our fundraising quarter. After the quarter ends, our campaign is legally required to send a public report to the FEC detailing how much grassroots support we have.

And this quarter is an especially important one: **This is our first fundraising deadline of the general election.**

I sat down with my team to look through our budget, and it looks like we need a surge of support before the end of the month to stay on track. [**So today, we’re setting a goal of raising $5,000 in grassroots donations before the fundraising quarter ends on June 30th at midnight. Can you chip in right now to help us reach our goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016597/352708562/-1979597812?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.26_b1_sts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGQzMzg4Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nD6K5RSeXzyzjer0u2aST3rdHlCJMleMS-r7I_aPGew=) | _[Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47016598/352708563/-1979597812?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.26_b1_sts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGQzMzg4Zi05ZGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nD6K5RSeXzyzjer0u2aST3rdHlCJMleMS-r7I_aPGew=)_
---
_This number didn’t just come out of thin air._ This is the amount that we need to raise to ensure we have the resources we need to win in November. And, if we send a strong report to the FEC, we’ll be able to build on our momentum and make sure we’re prepared to take on whatever attacks come our way.

clean_body: I hate to bother you on a Sunday... = Team, I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but I have something important I need to tell you. This Thursday is the last day of our fundraising quarter. After the quarter ends, our campaign is legally required to send a public report to the FEC detailing how much grassroots support we have. And this quarter is an especially important one: This is our first fundraising deadline of the general election. I sat down with my team to look through our budget, and it looks like we need a surge of support before the end of the month to stay on track. = | = This number didn’t just come out of thin air. This is the amount that we need to raise to ensure we have the resources we need to win in November. And, if we send a strong report to the FEC, we’ll be able to build on our momentum and make sure we’re prepared to take on whatever attacks come our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = This is a must-hit goal for our campaign. We simply cannot afford to fall behind during our first FEC deadline of the general election. Thank you for stepping up to = Shannon, Team Salinas | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =_

body:
🚨 Endorsed By President Trump 🚨
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/660afbbe99772e1e/22d9997dcad15971c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, Did you see the news? President Donald Trump just gave me his Complete & Total Endorsement! I am proud to receive this recognition: **“Congressman Kevin Hern is doing an outstanding job representing Oklahoma’s 1st Congressional District.** **As a successful businessman, Kevin knows how to Grow the Economy, Lower Taxes, and Eliminate Government Waste. Kevin is working hard to Secure the Border, Protect Life, Support our Military and Veterans, and Defend the First and Second Amendments. ** ** ****Kevin is a respected leader in Congress, and he has my Complete and Total Endorsement!”

** **\- President Donald Trump** President Trump’s leadership in the White House brought us the greatest economy in the history of the world - and his appointments to the Supreme Court achieved this week’s historic pro-life victory. I’m proud to have worked with President Trump to unleash America’s energy sector, progress that has been eroded under 18 months of Biden’s failed policies. Biden has allowed millions of illegal immigrants to cross our Southern border with no consequences and his foreign policy failures have embarrassed us on the world stage. **[I’m ready to take back the House & restore President Trump’s America First Agenda - are you with me?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/660afbbe99772e1e/07943f15f8f6c862c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** Together, we can save President Trump’s legacy! Thank you for your support, Kevin Hern

body:

Ray shared he was endorsing Dr. Kermit because, unlike his opponent, he took the time to meet with “a nobody” like him. We want to be clear: Ray isn’t a nobody, and neither are you. Every member of our community, from firefighters to retail workers, plays an important role — not just in your jobs, but as family members, | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019879/352746067/-1221368887?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220626ray_tk_90da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTQ1YzU4Ny1jNWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCWv_RWh6uDV5VGi5VErV2yt0kpUs9avbJGMB2HKJoE=)

**Earlier this month Dr. Kermit was endorsed by Ray — a wildland firefighter in our district.** Ray shared he was endorsing Dr. Kermit because, unlike his opponent, he took the time to meet with “a nobody” like him. We want to be clear: Ray isn’t a nobody, and neither are you. Every member of our community, from firefighters to retail workers, plays an important role — not just in your jobs, but as family members, mentors, and friends. **But for too long we’ve been represented by politicians who think low-wage or physical labor workers aren’t important enough to talk to one-on-one.** You deserve better than career politicians who only take calls from the wealthy and post photos of themselves in front of their own homes tagged with #DoorKnocking #TalkingToVoters. **Dr. Kermit is running a different kind of campaign** — unlike his opponent, career politician Kevin Kiley, he’ll show up to interviews, debates, and at your front door. Whether you’re a farmer or firefighter, a Democrat or Republican, he will take your call. If that’s the kind of campaign you can get behind, then we’d like to ask for your support. **Our FEC End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline is June 30, and we’re slightly short of our goal. **[Can you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019880/352746068/-1221368887?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220626ray_tk_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTQ1YzU4Ny1jNWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCWv_RWh6uDV5VGi5VErV2yt0kpUs9avbJGMB2HKJoE=)**** **** | **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:**

Every member of our community, from firefighters to retail workers, plays an important role — not just in your jobs, but as family members, | | = Earlier this month Dr. Kermit was endorsed by Ray — a wildland firefighter in our district. Ray shared he was endorsing Dr. Kermit because, unlike his opponent, he took the time to meet with “a nobody” like him. We want to be clear: Ray isn’t a nobody, and neither are you. Every member of our community, from firefighters to retail workers, plays an important role — not just in your jobs, but as family members, mentors, and friends. But for too long we’ve been represented by politicians who think low-wage or physical labor workers aren’t important enough to talk to one-on-one. You deserve better than career politicians who only take calls from the wealthy and post photos of themselves in front of their own homes tagged with #DoorKnocking #TalkingToVoters. Dr. Kermit is running a different kind of campaign — unlike his opponent, career politician Kevin Kiley, he’ll show up to interviews, debates, and at your front door. Whether you’re a farmer or firefighter, a Democrat or Republican, he will take your call. If that’s the kind of campaign you can get behind, then we’d like to ask for your support.
