name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: If we want to get something different out of Washington, we need to send someone different to Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
The best candidates to beat Republicans this November will be women who have fought and won reproductive rights, not corporate Democrats who cowered and let them be dismantled piece by piece.
#

Friends -
This is a long email about Friday’s Supreme Court decision, our fight to codify abortion rights, and why I’m running for Congress. Before you go on with your day, I hope you’ll take a moment to read it.
First, a bit of history:
When I challenged State Senator Jeff Klein in 2018, he had a long history of obstructing progress on abortion rights in New York. He and other corporate Democrats supported a Republican agenda in the Senate and blocked the laws and votes needed to codify legal abortion — despite running for reelection as a pro-choice Democrat year after year.
With Donald Trump in the White House following decades of Republican efforts to steal our judicial system, I knew I had to run and do everything I could to protect the right to abortion. So that’s what I did.
After we won, our movement passed the Reproductive Health Act in my first month in office, codying Roe and protecting abortion rights statewide.
This is the same kind of urgency that we need in Washington today. It’s one of the reasons why I’m running for Congress, and it’s why I need to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my people-powered, grassroots campaign today? Every donation will go toward defeating Sean Patrick Maloney and fighting for real progressive change in New York and across our entire country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852_59515_g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852.59515.g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852.59515.g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852.59515.g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852.59515.g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852.59515.g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)**
---
****
| **[Or another amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852.59515.g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)**
---
****
Here’s the truth: As a member of Democratic leadership, my current opponent Sean Patrick Maloney led the establishment’s 11th-hour rally against progressive champion Jessica Cisneros, helping Henry Cuellar — the most conservative, anti-choice Democrat in the House — win their primary in Texas.
My opponent’s actions beg a simple question: **How can he ask New Yorkers to trust him on abortion or any other issue while propping up anti-choice, corporately-bought incumbents?**
It’s time for a new generation of Democratic leaders who will stop at _nothing_ to protect our rights and values — especially the right to an abortion.
What our country needs is not just fierce, independent fighters, but people who are unafraid to stand up to Republicans and corporate interests, and who are willing to challenge the status quo in order to protect our rights. If we want to get something different out of Washington, we need to send someone different to Washington.
**The fact is that the best candidates to beat Republicans this November will be women who have fought and won reproductive rights, not corporate Democrats who cowered and let them be dismantled piece by piece.**
Doing that is going to take a lot of resources, and we’re funding this campaign the right way — all people, no corporate PACs. That’s why I have to ask, especially ahead of this week’s critical FEC fundraising deadline:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my people-powered, grassroots campaign for Congress today? Every donation will go toward defeating Sean Patrick Maloney and fighting for real progressive change in New York and across our entire country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852_59515_g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)
Thank you for being a part of this team. I know that so long as we stand together in solidarity and compassion for one another, we’re going to win this fight.
\- Alessandra

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220626-1-t1&refcode2=852.59515.g2GMCh&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh)**
---

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=852%2E59515%2Eg2GMCh).

name: JD Vance (Personal)
subject: A Declining America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ohioans for JD Inc

I’m a son of Middletown, Ohio with roots in the hollers of Appalachia. I love Ohio and I’m running to be the next Senator from Ohio because I believe our leaders have failed us and wilfully allowed the decline of America. In particular, allowing the decimation of our _once thriving_ Middle Class & manufacturing base to make a quick buck off of cheap Chinese industrial goods.

The elites we were supposed to trust have failed us time and time again, whether it be allowing crime to spiral out of control in our cities or shipping our jobs overseas to countries who hate our guts. Families in America are struggling to feed their children and fill up their car, but Joe Biden and his enablers continue to push the same agenda that got us into this mess. **I’m ready to lead the charge against the Biden agenda in the Senate on behalf of Freedom-loving Patriots across the country who are sick & tired of this failed Administration and the failed Washington Elites.**
**_We’re on the verge of defanging this destructive Administration,[but we’re low on resources and in danger of falling behind in the polls.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=db59d29ea6594dc5967808cfbf9f1fcb&_e=C6eq45gxx07MGSE0HWbv4sKent-5-rDMpMGkEmHxfTAF49BGkqvmqOsgCR8tzcz7M9RndqD1BuwqK0KsUbluBBOyziJcIit5dTzaDuY5TxjNGHrDgmQIhl6eazItrFU_byE3Cu-_4WzaAo6XA9dUhFuI24KSjatQf5ICB9_rauy5D6XQnjPL43-a7K3LcXnz2k1MmhCoHZ8TiFY8FfAClUVEY7HimQZRPG7-LGQoVRl2G_OrXqsllV2E2HakFIwX9U-hJKE7h6dmwy3OtIVUTJmu1kuhCzpDk0BdQAEIdGVriPO02Dd635R2OxM3rolwGSJPkzVvGShyD-47KiUDQWUYQRssOvyGn22IBVZR2A3Wh1XCuXN9B4JiFHkcYDXIseimwQbA1d5tev-Dy86T8L3VTlDocbH0cE0nA59D0oPYoukgvfoay4jc85noI0UzNfbLmQzmMTNdvx0mof7InuSEndHXQcc12eEJI8_r3XRKHvxQuVIj2GuLDvm24emXiYAi7wtDUL4Bg2k4pssIyPMCNPGCRdW106-A1OZx8Qg%3D)_**

clean_body: On my mind | Hey folks, JD Vance here. As I've been meeting with patriots across Ohio, I’ve been asked quite a lot about my vision for a stronger Ohio & America. My response: Saving America starts with flipping the Senate. That’s why I have to ask: | | ---|--- | | | I’m a son of Middletown, Ohio with roots in the hollers of Appalachia. I love Ohio and I’m running to be the next Senator from Ohio because I believe our leaders have failed us and wilfully allowed the decline of America. In particular, allowing the decimation of our once thriving Middle Class & manufacturing base to make a quick buck off of cheap Chinese industrial goods. The elites we were supposed to trust have failed us time and time again, whether it be allowing crime to spiral out of control in our cities or shipping our jobs overseas to countries who hate our guts. Families in America are struggling to feed their children and fill up their car, but Joe Biden and his enablers continue to push the same agenda that got us into this mess. I’m ready to lead the charge against the Biden agenda in the Senate on behalf of Freedom-loving Patriots across the country who are sick & tired of this failed Administration and the failed Washington Elites. We’re on the verge of defanging this destructive Administration, If we’re going to rein in the Biden Administration and usher in a new Generation of America First Leadership in Washington DC, that starts with you helping me hit the CRITICAL FEC End-Of-Quarter Deadline. Anything you can contribute will come at a critical point in my campaign. Thank you for your support. God Bless, \- JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ohioans for JD Inc., a joint fundraising committee authorized by and comprised of JD Vance for Senate Inc. and Working for Ohio. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Democrats, we call your bluff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
Voting blue is not enough| | | Hi there, I saw a video on Twitter recently. People in Texas protesting the overturning of Roe v. Wade were chanting: “Voting blue is not enough — Democrats, we call your bluff!” I couldn’t agree more. [You can watch the video here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47019952/352746341/-286800193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzlmMGZiNS1jOGY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U3N6QM12YwNOGEof0xduaNIXcho2JNU2riOD2JNR0P4=&emci=df47af6c-c7f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=9c9f0fb5-c8f5-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8222569) It has been 50 years since the Roe v. Wade ruling that guaranteed a constitutional right to an abortion. It’s been 7 weeks since it was leaked that the Supreme Court was going to overturn it. And in all that time, Democrats did not codify Roe v. Wade. The Women's Health Protection Act failed in the Senate in May. The Democrats have the White House, Senate, and House. They could abolish the filibuster. They could expand the Supreme Court, which originally had only six justices but now has nine. They could then fill those seats with justices who aren’t far-right, theocratic ideologues. They could enact term limits for the federal judiciary. Instead they’re sending fundraising texts and emails. Voting blue is not enough. We need better Democrats, and better politicians. Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06
---
| |
---
| | Rebecca Parson for Congress
PO Box 111388
Tacoma, WA 98411
United States

| | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington

name: Bianca Keaton, Campaign Manager
subject: re: our expenses for the next 134 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter, it’s
Bianca. If we haven’t met before, I’m the Campaign Manager for Team
Booker.

As Campaign Manager, my number-one priority for this campaign is to make
sure that our campaign can reach as many Kentucky voters as possible from
now until Election Day (134 days to be exact).

That means for the next 134 days we need to make sure we have the funds
required to make investments in our organizing strategy. Here are some
examples of the expenses we need to fund:

* $0.05: The price of printing one mailer.
* $15.28: The price of funding one voter registration team. Each of our
voter registration teams get clipboards, pens, printed materials to
share with voters, and training from our organizing team.
* $47.59: The price of gas to drive 395 miles — from the furthest point
of Kentucky to the other. Our staff and volunteers will be doing a lot
of driving to reach every corner of Kentucky to do our organizing
work.

I say all of this to underline why it’s so important we reach our big
end-of-quarter fundraising goal next Thursday. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220626.M08g_U&refcode=em20220626-2132&t=1001&akid=2132%2E346206%2EXvoTns ]Will you chip
in $5 or anything you can right now to help reach our goal
so we can make big investments in our organizing strategy?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220626.M08g_U&refcode=em20220626-2132&t=1020&akid=2132%2E346206%2EXvoTns ]Contribute $5

No one’s ever built a movement like this before in
Kentucky,
Peter.

Together, we are building the largest statewide deep organizing campaign
in Kentucky’s history. That means inviting as many Kentuckians as possible
to raise their voices in this upcoming election — especially those who
have been historically disenfranchised from voting and folks who typically
don’t turn in big numbers in our elections.

But we’re able to invest in our organizing strategy hinges on whether or
not we reach our big goal on Thursday. So I have to ask one final time:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220626.M08g_U&refcode=em20220626-2132&t=1021&akid=2132%2E346206%2EXvoTns ]Will you please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford
so we can fund our important organizing work? Every dollar you give helps
us reach more Kentuckians from the hood to the holler.

Thank you for being a part of this team and this movement,
Peter. I’m glad to have you on
our side as we fight for the Commonwealth that we love so much.

Together,

Bianca
Campaign Manager
Booker for Kentucky

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220626-2132-footer&t=1022&refcode2=2132_346206_XvoTns&akid=2132%2E346206%2EXvoTns

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2132%2E346206%2EXvoTns

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, we know
you’ve probably received a lot of emails this weekend, so we wanted to
quickly recap exactly what overturning Roe v. Wade means for Georgians:

The Supreme Court has left abortion rights up to states to decide — and
Georgia’s current governor is a dangerous, anti-abortion extremist who
bragged about signing “the toughest abortion bill in the country” in 2019.
And his bill banning abortion after just 6 weeks could go into effect as
soon as next week.

But if we elect Stacey Abrams, we will have a leader in Georgia who will
defend the right to an abortion, protect reproductive rights and stand up
for all Georgians.

first donation to our

difference in our fight to elect Stacey and defend reproductive rights.

| | | Tune In Monday Morning to Listen to Amanda Makki provide Legal Analysis on Newsmax!
Hi Friend!

_We are excited to have you tune in tomorrow at 630am, 7am and 815am to hear Amanda discuss political and legal matters, including US Supreme Court rulings from last week!_

Thanks to Governor DeSantis giving us this very winnable seat for conservatives (R+7), we are so thrilled that Amanda is continuing to be seen as a Conservative national voice!

Working at the Army General Counsel’s office just weeks after the 9/11 terrorist attacks, and as a Healthcare Lawyer in Congress to try and stop Obamacare, we need Amanda -- and our COUNTRY needs Amanda -- to get to Washington and hit the ground running on Day 1!

_**_Can you help us FINISH THIS WEEK STRONG - The very LAST fundraising quarter- with a small contribution of $25, $50 or $100?_**_

Gratefully,

Team Makki

We are excited to have you tune in tomorrow at 630am, 7am and 815am to hear Amanda discuss political and legal matters, including US Supreme Court rulings from last week! name: Joe Goldberg
subject: Why Eric is going to keep IL-17 blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Hi Peter, Joe Goldberg, Eric Sorensen’s Campaign Manager here. We’re in the middle of our Get Out the Vote weekend on the campaign, and I wanted to introduce myself. I knew that this was going to be an incredibly difficult cycle for Democrats and when deciding where I wanted to work, I knew I wanted two things:
1. I wanted a seat that mattered
2. I wanted a different type of candidate

Working for Eric here in IL-17 checked both of those boxes easily. IL-17 will be one of the most contested seats this fall. Both party committees have already lined up more than $7M in ad buys. Our MAGA opponent has $1.5M in the bank. The Democratic party has made it clear this seat is a priority; we can’t afford to lose it, because there aren’t two seats to gain elsewhere. Eric’s background is certainly different. As the community’s weatherman, he’s well known, liked, and trusted. IL-17 is geographically spread out, and he’s worked on TV for two decades in two of the three larger cities. We know Republicans are going to attack every Democrat this fall. It’s going to be much more difficult to paint him as something that he’s not. Why? Voters here already know and trust him. When we’re out in public, we can’t go more than five minutes without someone coming up to talk to him. I’ve never seen anything like it. There’s a genuine admiration for him. They want to tell him that they’re voting for him, that they loved a particular story he did, or that he saved their life by giving them advice during severe weather. I’m sure you’ve heard his stories by now – voters from all partisan stripes flocking to him because they know and trust him. I, Eric, and our whole team are grateful for your support. The reality is Eric needs your help. GOTV weekend is well underway, and Eric is out talking to voters all day. We still have a few thousand dollars left to raise. Can you chip in any amount so we can keep Eric in the streets knocking on doors? You can contribute online here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-june-em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47018533/352715779/1265397067?refcode=genemjune26j&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjczZjliMS1hYWY1LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvxMZdaQraIBi5s7bOVDXyiKJM8fhXxAmMK9G2dtutM=) |
